collectiondata.overview:
Limited Escapes: Curated Journeys Beyond the Ordinary

Step into a world of unparalleled exclusivity with our Limited Escapes—where each itinerary is a handcrafted masterpiece reserved for discerning travelers. At Travelxploria, celebrated as the Best Travel Agency, we elevate luxury to new heights by offering only a handful of seats to ultra-exclusive destinations. Whether you dream of a private desert oasis under starlit skies or a hidden cliff-edge villa overlooking a turquoise sea, our Limited Escapes transform once-in-a-lifetime fantasies into seamless realities.

Every best package in this collection is designed around the principle of “less is more.” We limit group sizes to ensure you experience genuine intimacy—be it in a secluded mountain hamlet, a remote island refuge, or an ancient vineyard estate. Imagine sipping vintage champagne at sunset on your own private peninsula, with only the ocean breeze as your companion. From bespoke transfers on chartered yachts and helicopters to behind-the-scenes tours of legendary landmarks after hours, our logistics are as discreet as they are luxurious, reflecting our reputation as the Best Tour Operator for elite adventures.

For couples seeking an extraordinary best honeymoon package, Limited Escapes offers romantic sanctuaries that few have ever seen. Envision a candlelit dinner suspended beneath a canopy of olive trees in a centuries-old hilltop hamlet, or a sunrise hot-air balloon flight over frost-tipped deserts, followed by breakfast on a windswept dune. Our honeymoon specialists craft every detail—from personalized love letters awaiting you in your suite to private spa treatments using locally foraged botanicals—solidifying Travelxploria’s standing as the Best International Travel Agent for personalized romance.

Families or small groups can also discover the thrill of exclusive discovery. Our family package options in Limited Escapes focus on immersive, private experiences: a bespoke treasure hunt through UNESCO-protected ruins, an after-hours gala in a centuries-old chateau, or a hands-on culinary session with a Michelin-starred chef in a private estate kitchen. With group sizes capped and safety protocols meticulously observed, you’ll create stories that few others can claim—an affirmation of why we’re recognized as the Best International Tour Operator for bespoke group travel.

What truly separates our Limited Escapes is a commitment to authenticity and privacy. We partner with family-run luxury hideaways, conservation-minded sanctuaries, and elite local collectors to grant you access to storied art collections, protected wildlife reserves, and secret beach coves. Each journey is carbon-offset and supports community initiatives, making your best package not only exclusive but also ethically enriching.

Every element of your Limited Escape is customizable. Craving a midnight submarine excursion beneath bioluminescent waves? We’ll arrange it. Longing for a private sunrise yoga ceremony on a clifftop terrace? Consider it scheduled. Dreaming of a midnight treasure hunt in a desert palace? Your personal curator awaits. This level of personalization has cemented Travelxploria’s reputation as the Best Travel Agency for travelers who settle for nothing less than the extraordinary.

Hover over our “Limited Escapes” menu and unlock a realm where privacy, luxury, and adventure converge. With Travelxploria guiding the way, your next voyage becomes an exclusive legend—crafted just for you.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Morocco with airport transfer, hotel check-in, and welcome dinner.
  • Guided city tour of Casablanca including Hassan II Mosque; scenic drive to Marrakech with a carriage ride to Jemaa el-Fnaa.
  • Full-day guided city tour exploring Marrakech’s historic highlights and evening folklore dinner show (optional).
  • Journey through the Atlas Mountains with stops at Ait Benhaddou and Ouarzazate before reaching Boumalne Dades.
  • Explore Todgha Gorge and Ksar el Khorbat before arriving in the desert town of Erfoud for optional dune excursion.
  • Scenic drive through the Atlas Mountains with stops in Midelt, Azrou, and Bhalil, ending in Fez with dinner.
  • Guided city tour of Fez followed by a scenic drive north through the Rif valleys to Tangier.
  • Free time in Tangier, visit the seaside town of Asilah, then continue to Rabat for the night.
  • Morning city tour of Rabat and short drive to Casablanca for a relaxed final afternoon.
  • Breakfast and end of the journey with fond memories and Travelxploria assistance for departure.

This morning, join our TravelXploria representative for a guided tour of Casablanca, Morocco’s largest city and economic hub. We’ll explore the grand boulevards, admire the charm of Mohamed V Square with its fountain, Moorish architecture, and palm-lined avenues, and stroll through the Arab League Park and the quaint little Medina. A highlight of the tour is the visit to the iconic Hassan II Mosque, perched by the sea with its towering 210-meter minaret. After the tour, enjoy free time for lunch at La Corniche. At 3:30 p.m., we depart for Marrakech, arriving by 6:45 p.m. Enjoy a horse-drawn carriage ride and dinner.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Casablanca","to":"Marrakesh","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1655,"h_name":"Grand Mogador Menara","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Marrakesh","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Grand Mogador Menara/1747474714176-Grand Mogador Menara.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Grand Mogador Menara/1747474714308-Grand Mogador Menara1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Grand Mogador Menara/1747474714356-Grand Mogador Menara2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Marrakech City Tour","day_summary":"

At 08:15 a.m., our Travelxploria representative will accompany you on a guided city tour of Marrakech, a vibrant city surrounded by ochre walls and dotted with palm trees. We’ll explore the lively Jemaa el-Fnaa square, wander through the colorful Medina, and admire the stunning Koutoubia Mosque. The tour also includes a visit to the beautiful Bahia Palace (entry included), showcasing traditional Moroccan architecture. Lunch will be served at the hotel, and the afternoon is yours to relax or explore at your leisure. In the evening, we suggest attending the Fantasy dinner show to experience Morocco’s diverse and enchanting folkloric traditions.


","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"BOUMALNE DADES","country":"Morocco","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929881-AdobeStock_140643598.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929521-AdobeStock_66157969.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929726-AdobeStock_131049519.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062930036-AdobeStock_140643735.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Marrakech - Ait Benhaddou - Ourzazate - Boumalne Dades","day_summary":"

At 08:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Marrakech and journey through the breathtaking Atlas Mountains, the natural divide between the city and the Sahara Desert. Along the way, we’ll stop at a charming mountain village. By 01:30 p.m., we’ll reach Ait Benhaddou, a UNESCO World Heritage site famed for its scenic mud-brick architecture featured in many films. After lunch and a stroll, we’ll continue to Ouarzazate at 03:30 p.m., another historic desert city. At 04:30 p.m., we travel onward through arid plains and oasis valleys, arriving in Boumalne Dades at 06:00 p.m. for dinner and overnight. Note: Route may change due to weather.

We’ll depart Boumalne Dades at 07:15 a.m., embarking on a scenic journey through the Valley of the Kasbahs, a region rich in history and lined with traditional adobe fortresses. Along the way, admire oases, palm groves, and charming Berber villages. At 09:00 a.m., we’ll arrive at the majestic Todgha Gorge for a short exploration. By 10:45 a.m., we’ll stop at Ksar el Khorbat, a fortified desert village supported by the Europamundo Foundation. After departing at 11:45 a.m., we’ll reach Erfoud at 02:00 p.m. for lunch and relaxation. An optional sunset off-road excursion to Merzouga’s sand dunes is available with dinner.

We begin our journey from Erfoud at 08:00 a.m., crossing the majestic Atlas Mountains and scenic gorges, passing through a high plateau where nomadic shepherds dwell. At 11:30 a.m., we pause in Midelt for a brief walk. After departing at 12:00 p.m., we stop for an included lunch beside a serene mountain lake. The landscape then transforms into dense forests. At 03:15 p.m., we visit Azrou’s “House of Cedars” and observe native monkeys. After a 05:15 p.m. stop in the cave-dwelling town of Bhalil, we reach Fez by 06:45 p.m., admiring panoramic city views from the Marinid Tombs before dinner.

At 08:00 a.m., we depart the hotel for a guided city tour of Fez, Morocco’s cultural capital. We'll explore its iconic landmarks, including the Royal Palace’s Bronze Gates, the Jewish Quarter, the Tanners’ Quarter, and the lively souks. The highlight is the ancient Medina, rich in Arabian heritage. A traditional Moroccan lunch will be served in a beautifully restored palace within the Medina (included). At 03:00 p.m., we leave Fez, journeying north through the scenic Rif valleys, filled with olive groves and fruit fields. By 08:00 p.m., we arrive in Tangier, where dinner will be provided and included in the package.

We’ll begin the day with some free time to explore Tangier at your leisure. Later, we head south to the coastal gem of Asilah, a beautifully preserved walled city once known as a pirate haven. Today, it enchants visitors with its whitewashed buildings, ocean views, and artistic flair. You’ll have time to stroll its charming streets and enjoy lunch at your own pace (your guide will share details). At 4:30 p.m., we depart Asilah, traveling along the motorway to Rabat, Morocco’s diplomatic capital. By 7:30 p.m., we arrive in Rabat, where dinner and comfortable overnight accommodation will be provided.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll start a panoramic tour of Morocco’s capital, Rabat, known for its stunning beauty. Key sights include the impressive Oudayas Fortress, the iconic Hassan Tower and King Mohammed V’s mausoleum, the historic Andalusian Walls, the exterior of the Royal Palace, and the modern embassy districts. After the guided tour, you’ll have some free time to explore the city at your own pace. We’ll depart Rabat at 11:00 a.m. and arrive in Casablanca by 12:15 p.m., leaving the afternoon free for last-minute shopping and personal activities.

After breakfast, our unforgettable journey comes to a close, leaving you with lasting memories of Morocco’s beauty and culture. Our TravelXploria representative will be there to assist you with your departure arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable farewell. We hope this experience has inspired you and look forward to welcoming you on your next adventure with TravelXploria.

packages.overview:
• Experience breathtaking views of Mount Fuji, a scenic lake cruise, and a traditional stay at a Japanese Ryokan.
  • Explore a restored traditional village, marvel at Shiraito Falls, visit the Toyota Museum, and arrive in historic Kyoto.
  • Immerse yourself in Kyoto’s rich heritage with visits to temples, bamboo groves, shrines, and the iconic Gion district.
  • Wander the charming post-town of Tsumago, visit Matsumoto’s striking black castle, and return to Tokyo by evening.

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

We begin our day at 08:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kawaguchiko, passing the beautiful Kawaguchi and Saiko Lakes. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Iyashi no Sato Nenba, a traditional mountain village rebuilt as an open-air museum after being destroyed by a typhoon in 1966. Here, you can explore restored thatched-roof houses now functioning as craft shops, eateries, and cultural exhibits. At 10:45 a.m., we reach Shiraito Falls, known for their stunning 20-meter cascades. After lunch, we visit the Toyota Museum at 03:15 p.m., then continue to Kyoto, arriving by 07:00 p.m.

We begin our day at 08:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kawaguchiko, passing the beautiful Kawaguchi and Saiko Lakes. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Iyashi no Sato Nenba, a traditional mountain village rebuilt as an open-air museum after being destroyed by a typhoon in 1966. Here, you can explore restored thatched-roof houses now functioning as craft shops, eateries, and cultural exhibits. At 10:45 a.m., we reach Shiraito Falls, known for their stunning 20-meter cascades. After lunch, we visit the Toyota Museum at 03:15 p.m., then continue to Kyoto, arriving by 07:00 p.m.

Today, we’ll immerse ourselves in the rich cultural heritage of Kyoto, Japan’s imperial capital from 794 to 1868. Remarkably untouched during World War II, Kyoto has preserved its artistic treasures. Our journey begins in Arashiyama, where we’ll admire the scenic Togetsukyo Bridge and visit the revered Tenryuji Temple, followed by a peaceful walk through the enchanting bamboo forest. We’ll then explore Fushimi Inari Shrine, the Imperial Palace, and the stunning Golden Pavilion (Kinkakuji Temple). In the evening, we’ll transfer you to Gion, Kyoto’s traditional district. Enjoy free time here, with the return to the hotel on your own by taxi.

At 07:30 a.m., we’ll depart from Kyoto and begin our scenic journey through Japan’s picturesque countryside toward the historic village of Tsumago. Arriving around 11:15 a.m., you’ll discover this charming wooden town, widely regarded as one of Japan’s most beautiful. Enjoy some free time to explore its preserved Edo-period streets before savoring a traditional lunch at a local restaurant. At 01:30 p.m., we’ll continue to Matsumoto, where we’ll arrive at 02:45 p.m. to visit the iconic Matsumoto Castle, known as “The Crow” for its striking black façade. After some leisure time, we’ll depart at 05:00 p.m. and reach Tokyo by 08:30–09:00 p.m.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Tokyo, meet our Travelxploria Representative, and transfer to the hotel for a relaxed day at leisure.
  • Explore Tokyo's top landmarks including Zojoji Temple, Shibuya Crossing, Meiji Shrine, and Asakusa, with lunch and dinner included.
  • Travel to Mount Fuji and Kawaguchiko with stunning views, a lake cruise, and traditional Ryokan stay with onsen.
  • Discover a traditional mountain village, Shiraito Falls, and the Toyota Museum before arriving in Kyoto.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Kyoto, visiting temples, shrines, bamboo forests, and the famous Gion district.
  • Visit Todaiji Temple, Horyuji Temple, and transfer to Osaka with an evening in lively Dotonbori.
  • Enjoy breakfast and bid farewell to Japan with cherished memories, assisted by your Travelxploria Representative.

Welcome to Japan! Upon your arrival and completion of customs and immigration procedures, you will be warmly greeted by our Travelxploria Representative. You’ll then be transferred to your hotel via a comfortable shared shuttle bus. The remainder of the day is free for you to unwind or begin exploring the vibrant surroundings at your own pace. Later in the afternoon, our representative will provide you with all the important details and timings related to the exciting journey that lies ahead.

This morning, embark on an extensive guided tour of Tokyo, lasting approximately five hours, exploring the city’s vibrant energy and peaceful charm. Begin with a brief stop at Zojoji Temple, offering a stunning view of Tokyo Tower and featuring hundreds of Jizo statues, protectors of children. Continue to the iconic Shibuya Crossing, followed by a visit to the Meiji Shrine, dedicated to Emperor Meiji and Empress Shoken. Travel along the stylish Omotesando Avenue, admire the Imperial Palace gardens and Nijubashi Bridge, and pass through Akihabara, Tokyo’s hub for anime and electronics, and Kokugikan Sumo Arena. Conclude the tour at the historic Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant before returning to the hotel. In the evening, meet your guide at 6:30 p.m. and travel by metro to explore Shinjuku’s dynamic nightlife, followed by dinner at a local restaurant. Return to the hotel by metro, accompanied by your guide.

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Kyoto and travel to Nara, arriving by 9:00 a.m. to visit the iconic Todaiji Temple, built in 752 and home to a majestic giant Buddha statue. Surrounded by a peaceful park with friendly, free-roaming deer, it’s a perfect spot for photos and reflection. At 10:30 a.m., we’ll head to Horyuji Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site with ancient wooden structures and deep spiritual heritage. After exploring, we’ll enjoy lunch before continuing to Osaka at 2:30 p.m. In the evening, we’ll visit Dotonbori, where you can experience its vibrant nightlife, neon lights, and delicious cuisine.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Kyoto and travel to Nara, arriving by 9:00 a.m. to visit the iconic Todaiji Temple, built in 752 and home to a majestic giant Buddha statue. Surrounded by a peaceful park with friendly, free-roaming deer, it’s a perfect spot for photos and reflection. At 10:30 a.m., we’ll head to Horyuji Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site with ancient wooden structures and deep spiritual heritage. After exploring, we’ll enjoy lunch before continuing to Osaka at 2:30 p.m. In the evening, we’ll visit Dotonbori, where you can experience its vibrant nightlife, neon lights, and delicious cuisine.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Tokyo, meet the Travelxploria Representative, and transfer to your hotel with the rest of the day at leisure.
  • Explore Tokyo’s iconic landmarks on a guided city tour with visits to temples, shrines, gardens, and vibrant districts, followed by a night out in Shinjuku.
  • Travel to Kawaguchiko and Mount Fuji, enjoy stunning views, a boat ride, and a traditional Ryokan experience with onsen and dinner.
  • Visit Iyashi no Sato Nenba, the breathtaking Shiraito Falls, the Toyota Museum, and arrive in Kyoto in the evening.
  • Discover Kyoto’s rich heritage with visits to temples, bamboo forests, shrines, and the geisha district of Gion.
  • Journey through rural Japan visiting the traditional village of Tsumago and historic Matsumoto Castle before returning to Tokyo.
  • Conclude your unforgettable journey with cherished memories as you depart from Japan.

This morning, embark on an extensive guided tour of Tokyo, lasting approximately five hours, exploring the city’s vibrant energy and peaceful charm. Begin with a brief stop at Zojoji Temple, offering a stunning view of Tokyo Tower and featuring hundreds of Jizo statues, protectors of children. Continue to the iconic Shibuya Crossing, followed by a visit to the Meiji Shrine, dedicated to Emperor Meiji and Empress Shoken. Travel along the stylish Omotesando Avenue, admire the Imperial Palace gardens and Nijubashi Bridge, and pass through Akihabara, Tokyo’s hub for anime and electronics, and Kokugikan Sumo Arena. Conclude the tour at the historic Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant before returning to the hotel. In the evening, meet your guide at 6:30 p.m. and travel by metro to explore Shinjuku’s dynamic nightlife, followed by dinner at a local restaurant. Return to the hotel by metro, accompanied by your guide.

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

We begin our day at 08:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kawaguchiko, passing the beautiful Kawaguchi and Saiko Lakes. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Iyashi no Sato Nenba, a traditional mountain village rebuilt as an open-air museum after being destroyed by a typhoon in 1966. Here, you can explore restored thatched-roof houses now functioning as craft shops, eateries, and cultural exhibits. At 10:45 a.m., we reach Shiraito Falls, known for their stunning 20-meter cascades. After lunch, we visit the Toyota Museum at 03:15 p.m., then continue to Kyoto, arriving by 07:00 p.m.

Today, we’ll immerse ourselves in the rich cultural heritage of Kyoto, Japan’s imperial capital from 794 to 1868. Remarkably untouched during World War II, Kyoto has preserved its artistic treasures. Our journey begins in Arashiyama, where we’ll admire the scenic Togetsukyo Bridge and visit the revered Tenryuji Temple, followed by a peaceful walk through the enchanting bamboo forest. We’ll then explore Fushimi Inari Shrine, the Imperial Palace, and the stunning Golden Pavilion (Kinkakuji Temple). In the evening, we’ll transfer you to Gion, Kyoto’s traditional district. Enjoy free time here, with the return to the hotel on your own by taxi.

At 07:30 a.m., we’ll depart from Kyoto and begin our scenic journey through Japan’s picturesque countryside toward the historic village of Tsumago. Arriving around 11:15 a.m., you’ll discover this charming wooden town, widely regarded as one of Japan’s most beautiful. Enjoy some free time to explore its preserved Edo-period streets before savoring a traditional lunch at a local restaurant. At 01:30 p.m., we’ll continue to Matsumoto, where we’ll arrive at 02:45 p.m. to visit the iconic Matsumoto Castle, known as “The Crow” for its striking black façade. After some leisure time, we’ll depart at 05:00 p.m. and reach Tokyo by 08:30–09:00 p.m.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to Australia’s cultural capital.
  • Witness nature’s magic at the Phillip Island Penguin Parade.
  • Explore the breathtaking sights along the Great Ocean Road.
  • Depart Melbourne and head to your next adventure in Sydney.
  • Discover Sydney's top attractions with the Merlin Two Attraction Pass and Sydney Opera House Tour, then soar above the city on a thrilling helicopter flight.
  • Experience the stunning Blue Mountains at sunset.
  • Depart from Sydney and begin your island escape at Tangalooma.
  • Unwind at Tangalooma Island Resort amidst unspoiled natural beauty.
  • Enjoy the final moments on Tangalooma before heading to the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into the fun with theme park access and a magical hot air balloon ride.
  • Depart from the Gold Coast, taking cherished memories home with you.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

Whether you're heading home or continuing your adventure, the ferry ride ensures a hassle-free experience marked by friendly service, reliability, and the perfect opportunity to reflect on your island escape before returning to the vibrant pace of everyday life.

Experience the ultimate thrill with the Best of Both Worlds pass, offering full-day admission to both Sea World and Movie World for an unforgettable fusion of aquatic wonders and cinematic adventures. packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne and begin your Australian adventure.
  • Experience wildlife and the famous Penguin Parade on Phillip Island.
  • Discover the stunning Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s Surf Coast.
  • Transfer from Melbourne to the airport and fly to the Gold Coast.
  • Enjoy thrilling fun at Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.
  • Depart the Gold Coast with a private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Explore Sydney with a 24-hour Big Bus hop-on-hop-off pass and visit four top attractions.
  • Take a full-day tour of the breathtaking Blue Mountains.
  • Depart from Sydney, taking home wonderful memories of Australia.​

[{"city":"Melbourne","country":"Australia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892745-AdobeStock_571879591.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892229-AdobeStock_122918061.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058891761-AdobeStock_14809750.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892054-AdobeStock_78014018.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892400-AdobeStock_123778075.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892573-AdobeStock_158368495.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive in Melbourne - Eureka Skydeck","day_summary":"

Enjoy a stress-free arrival as our Travelxploria representative warmly welcomes you at the airport and escorts you to your 4-star hotel in Melbourne’s Central Business District, where a comfortable stay with breakfast included awaits you.

Discover Melbourne from an entirely new vantage point at the Melbourne Skydeck, the highest observation deck in the Southern Hemisphere, where the city stretches out beneath you from an awe-inspiring height of nearly 300 meters. This unforgettable experience offers breathtaking panoramic views and a thrilling perspective that truly takes you to new heights.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Melbourne, the vibrant Arts and Cultural Capital of Australia.
  • Witness breathtaking wildlife and the iconic Penguin Parade at Phillip Island.
  • Discover Melbourne’s history, art, and café culture on a half-day city tour.
  • Journey along the scenic Great Ocean Road and explore Victoria’s Surf Coast.
  • Bid farewell to Melbourne with a private transfer to the airport for your next adventure.
  • Arrive in the Gold Coast and enjoy a seamless transfer with your ROO Pass.
  • Dive into thrills at Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.
  • Soar above the Hinterland with a hot air balloon ride and enjoy a bonus Arro Jet experience.
  • Depart the Gold Coast with a private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Arrive in Sydney and explore top attractions with your Merli

  • n Four Attraction Pass.
  • Dive deeper into Sydney with an Opera House tour and a full-day Blue Mountains experience.
  • Depart Sydney, carrying unforgettable memories of your Australian adventure.

Explore Sydney at your own pace aboard the Big Bus Sydney, an open-top double-decker bus offering a flexible hop-on, hop-off experience with informative commentary in multiple languages. Discover iconic attractions like the Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, Darling Harbour, and Bondi Beach, with the freedom to disembark and explore museums, cafes, and scenic walks at your leisure. Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

packages.package_name: Experience the Egyptian tour with Dahabiya Cruise
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of ancient wonders, rich history, and breathtaking landscapes along the Nile River.

  2. Cairo: The capital city, home to the Great Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and bustling markets like Khan El Khalili.

  3. Dahabiya: A luxurious, traditional sailboat offering an exclusive Nile River cruise, providing a serene and intimate journey through Egypt’s historic sites.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at the hotel, preparing for an unforgettable journey through Egypt’s most iconic landmarks. Begin at the Pyramids Plateau, home to the legendary Great Pyramid of Cheops, the Pyramid of Chephren, and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Stand in awe before the enigmatic Great Sphinx, a timeless guardian of these ancient marvels.

Continue your cultural exploration with a visit to the Papyrus Institute, where you’ll witness the traditional art of papermaking, followed by a shopping experience at the Papyrus Museum, Perfume Factory, and Jewelry Shop.

Later, dive into Egypt’s rich history at the Egyptian Museum, home to a vast collection of priceless artifacts, including the treasures of King Tutankhamun.The evening is yours to explore at leisure before returning to your hotel for a restful night Overnight in Cairo

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Dahabiya","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Embark Dahabiya Cruise & Sightseeing","day_summary":"

Step aboard a traditional Dahabiya, a charming sailboat that offers a more intimate and tranquil Nile cruising experience. As you glide along the legendary River Nile, enjoy personalized service, gourmet meals, and stops at off-the-beaten-path temples and villages. Visit hidden gems like El Kab, Gebel el-Silsila, and Edfu Temple, all while soaking in the timeless scenery of palm-fringed banks and ancient ruins. With fewer crowds and a slower pace, the Dahabiya cruise is a luxurious and authentic way to explore Egypt’s rich history and natural beauty.

Start your day with a leisurely breakfast on board as your Dahabiya sails towards Kom Ombo, a fascinating riverside temple dedicated to the gods Sobek and Haroeris. Disembark and explore this unique double temple, where ancient carvings depict medical instruments and rituals once practiced by Egyptian priests.

Return to the cruise for a delicious lunch as the Dahabiya continues sailing towards Edfu. Upon arrival, admire the magnificent Temple of Horus, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, dedicated to the falcon-headed god.

Enjoy a relaxing evening on board, taking in the tranquil atmosphere of the Nile as you dine under the stars.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"El-Kab & Esna Exploration","day_summary":"

Begin the day with a scenic sail to El-Kab, the ancient city of Nekheb, once a significant religious and military center of Upper Egypt. Disembark to explore rock-cut tombs from the Old Kingdom, adorned with fascinating hieroglyphics and paintings, as well as the remains of ancient temples.

Return to the Dahabiya and enjoy a delicious lunch on board as the journey continues towards Esna, a charming town known for its temple dedicated to Khnum, the ram-headed god of creation.

Spend your final night on the Dahabiya, enjoying a delightful dinner and the serene beauty of the Nile.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Cairo","country":"Egypt","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Cairo/1744964976321-AdobeStock_125801595.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Cairo/1744964976461-AdobeStock_194613298.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Luxor Sightseeing & Flight to Cairo","day_summary":"

After breakfast on board, disembark at Esna and transfer by car to Luxor for a day of exploration. Begin with a visit to the magnificent Karnak Temple, dedicated to Amun-Ra, where you can marvel at the towering obelisks and the grand Hypostyle Hall. Continue to the West Bank, exploring the Valley of the Kings, home to the tombs of Egypt’s legendary pharaohs, including an optional visit to Tutankhamun’s tomb. Visit the Temple of Queen Hatshepsut, a stunning tribute to Egypt’s first female pharaoh, and stop at the Colossi of Memnon, two massive statues that have stood for centuries. After an enriching day, transfer to Luxor Airport for your flight to Cairo, where you’ll be met by our representative and escorted to your hotel for an overnight stay.

packages.package_name: Majestic Egypt Package with Nile Cruise
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of timeless wonders, ancient temples, and the majestic Nile, offering an unforgettable journey through history.

  2. Cairo: Explore the Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and Khan El Khalili Bazaar. Experience the city's vibrant culture, historic mosques, and a scenic Nile dinner cruise.

  3. Aswan: A serene Nile city known for the Philae Temple, Unfinished Obelisk, Nubian villages, and the High Dam. Take a relaxing felucca ride on the Nile.

  4. Nile Cruise: Sail from Aswan to Luxor, visiting Kom Ombo, Edfu, Karnak Temple, and the Valley of the Kings while enjoying luxury accommodations and scenic views.

packages.package_name: A Luxurious Dahabiya Nile Cruise Experience
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A timeless land of pharaohs, pyramids, and the majestic Nile River, offering a unique blend of history and luxury.

  2. Dahabiya: A traditional, elegant sailboat providing an intimate and exclusive Nile River cruise, far from the crowds of larger ships.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Dahabiya","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Dahabiya Nile Cruise Adventure","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable Dahabiya Nile Cruise Adventure with Travelxploria, where timeless elegance meets serene exploration. Glide along the majestic Nile aboard a luxurious, wind-powered Dahabiya, offering an intimate and exclusive journey. Discover hidden temples, ancient ruins, and charming riverside villages far from the crowds. Savor gourmet meals on deck under starlit skies and enjoy personalized service throughout. Our Travelxploria representative ensures every detail is taken care of, from guided tours to onboard comfort. Experience Egypt’s rich heritage and breathtaking landscapes in the most authentic way.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Luxor","to":"Esna","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":1263,"h_name":"Dahabiya Nile Cruise","h_country":"Egypt","h_city":"Dahabiya","h_type":"Cruise","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[]"}],"4":[{"h_id":1264,"h_name":"Dahabiya Golden Falcon","h_country":"Egypt","h_city":"Dahabiya","h_type":"Cruise","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1265,"h_name":"Dahabiya Cleopatra","h_country":"Egypt","h_city":"Dahabiya","h_type":"Cruise","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Edfu Temple & Wadi el Shat Exploration ","day_summary":"

Wake up to a delightful breakfast on board as the Dahabiya sails towards Edfu, offering breathtaking views where the golden desert dunes meet lush date palm groves—a landscape unchanged for centuries. Upon arrival, visit the magnificent Temple of Horus, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, where ancient ceremonies once honored the falcon-headed god with live falcons.

Continue sailing to Wadi el Shat, where you’ll take a scenic walk through charming villages and the vast desert, immersing yourself in the local way of life. As the sun sets, the Dahabiya anchors at a secluded island, where you can unwind and enjoy a magical dinner under the stars—either on board or along the tranquil banks of the Nile. Enjoy a peaceful second night on board, surrounded by the serenity of Egypt’s timeless landscapes.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Gebel el Silsila to Kom Ombo ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a peaceful breakfast on board as the Dahabiya sails to Gebel El Silsila, a hidden gem along the Nile. Relax on deck while watching timeless riverside scenes glide by. Upon arrival, explore the rock-cut chapels of Seti I, Ramesses II, Merenptah, and Horemheb, as well as the ancient sandstone quarries that once supplied Egypt’s grand temples.

As you enjoy lunch on the sun deck, the Dahabiya continues towards Kom Ombo, home of the fascinating double temple dedicated to both Sobek, the crocodile god, and Haroeris, the falcon god. In the evening, experience a magical dinner around a campfire on the banks of the Nile, creating memories under the starry sky. Drift into the third night on board embraced by the quiet charm of Egypt.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"From Desert Traders to Nubian Gardens ","day_summary":"

Wake up to a leisurely breakfast on board as the Dahabiya glides towards Daraw, a historic village once bustling with camel caravans arriving from Sudan after their arduous 40-day trek through the Libyan Desert. Stroll through the vibrant local market, experiencing its rich traditions and lively atmosphere.

As the journey continues, sail towards El Koubania, a charming Nubian village near Aswan. Wander through its lush gardens filled with citrus and mango trees, offering a refreshing contrast to the desert landscapes. Spend your final night on board, savoring a delightful dinner under the serene Nile sky. 

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell & Departure ","day_summary":"

Enjoy a final breakfast as you reflect on the unforgettable experiences of your Egyptian adventure. After check-out, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless transfer to your designated hotel or airport, depending on your itinerary. Whether heading home or continuing your travels, we guarantee a smooth and hassle-free departure, leaving you with cherished memories of Egypt’s timeless wonders. Safe travels! 

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Esna","to":"Luxor Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.package_name: The Ancient Egyptian Tour with Luxurious Nile Cruise
packages.overview:
1: Arrive in Cairo, meet Travelxploria's Representative, transfer to hotel & overnight.

2: Visit Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx & Papyrus Institute, leisure & overnight in Cairo.

3: Full-day Alexandria city tour, return to Cairo & overnight.

4: Fly to Aswan, board Nile Cruise, visit High Dam & Unfinished Obelisk, overnight onboard.

5: Sail to Kom Ombo & Edfu, explore temples, overnight onboard.

6: Sail to Luxor, visit Karnak Temple, leisure & overnight onboard.

7: Visit West Bank of Luxor, fly to Cairo, transfer to hotel & overnight.

8: Check out, transfer to Cairo International Airport for departure.

After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria's Representative will take you on an unforgettable journey through ancient Egypt, starting with the iconic Pyramids Plateau. Explore the Great Pyramid of Cheops, the largest and only surviving wonder of the Seven Great Wonders of the Ancient World, followed by the well-preserved Pyramid of Chephren and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Marvel at the Sphinx, a breathtaking monument carved from natural rock, with its lion's body stretching 45 meters and paws extending 15 meters. Visit the Papyrus Institute to learn about ancient paper-making techniques, followed by a shopping experience at the Papyrus Museum, Perfume Factory, and Jewelry Shop. The evening is free at leisure, and you will return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Day Tour Alexandria city","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria's Representative will accompany you on a scenic drive to Alexandria (approximately 3 hours). Upon arrival, explore the city's iconic landmarks, including the mysterious Catacomb of Kom el Shouqafa and the towering Pompey’s Pillar. Enjoy a photo stop at the historic Qaitbay Fort, visit the stunning Al-Morsi Abu Al-Abbas Mosque, and take in a panoramic view of the renowned Bibliotheca Alexandrina. After a day of exploration, return to Cairo in the evening for an overnight stay at your hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Nile Cruise","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":" Arrive Aswan Airport - Nile cruise - Aswan Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast and check-out, Travelxploria's Representative will transfer you to Cairo Airport for your domestic flight to Aswan. Upon arrival, our representative will meet you and escort you to your Nile cruise. After embarking and settling in, meet your guide for an enriching visit to Aswan’s iconic landmarks, including the High Dam and the Unfinished Obelisk. Return to the cruise for check-in and lunch, followed by a leisurely evening where you can explore optional excursions or simply unwind onboard. Enjoy dinner and an overnight stay on the cruise.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Nile Cruise - Karnak temple","day_summary":"

The evening is yours to enjoy at leisure, with optional excursions available or simply relaxing onboard. Conclude the day with dinner and an overnight stay on the cruise, preparing for your journey back to Cairo the next day.

Later, transfer to Luxor Airport for your flight to Cairo, where upon arrival, you will be greeted and transferred to your hotel for an overnight stay.

packages.overview:
• ​Amman - the capitalof Jordan ; a fascinating city of contrasts – a unique blend of old and new
  • Jerash -The Greco Roman ruins.
  • Ajloun: Ajloun castle
  • Um Qais castle
  • Mount Nebo –The memorialplace of Moses
  • Madaba – St. George’sChurch and the mosaic map of the Holy Land.
  • Dana – Dana Village
  • Petra – thespectacular Rose- Red city of the ancientNabateans and one of the world’s seven
    wonders (Petra)
  • Wadi Rum – the home of Lawrenceof Arabia, also known as the valley of the moon
  • Dead Sea – unique swimming experience in buoyant water at the lowest point on the Earth.
    Take advantage of the useful Dead Sea rich minerals and mud.
  • Aqaba – the Red Sea

Jerash-Ajloun- Um Qais - Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at your hotel, begin a guided tour of Amman, the capital of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, once known as Rabbat Ammon and later Philadelphia. Visit iconic landmarks including the Citadel, Temple of Hercules, Roman Theatre, Nymphaeum, King Abdullah Mosque (Blue Mosque), and the Umayyad Palace. Then, drive through scenic pine forests and olive groves to the ancient city of Jerash, one of the best-preserved Greco-Roman cities, known as the Pompeii of the East. Continue to Ajloun to explore the historic Qa'lat Al Rabad fortress, once a base for Saladin's campaigns. Return to Amman in the evening for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Dana","country":"Jordan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Amman, Mount Nebo, Madaba – Dana","day_summary":"

Breakfast at hotel then check-out for full day excursion. In the way , we will visit visit Mount Nebo the site of Moses’ tomb . From there Moses viewed the promised Land in Canaan , and died there and was buried in a nearby valley . Here there are ruins of 4th. and 6th c. churches whose floors are still covered with marvelous mosaic. Afterwards to Madaba this town has a long history , being first mentioned in the Bible and in the Mesha Stele when it was a Moabite town, visit St. George orthodox Christian church the mosaic Map of Jerusalem, Palestine, Jordan, Israel & Egypt . Madaba is famous as a land of mosaics! Then you will be transferred to Dana Hotel village for dinner & O/N .

Breakfast at Dana visit the Dana Trail, two-hour hike offering breathtaking views of the Dana Biosphere Reserve in Jordan. We continue towards Karak, or Kerak, is a historic city in Jordan known for its imposing Crusader castle, Karak Castle, perched on a hilltop. The castle, built in the 12th century, offers panoramic views of the surrounding landscape. Karak is steeped in history, with archaeological sites revealing traces of various civilizations. The city provides a captivating glimpse into Jordan's past, attracting visitors with its medieval charm. Additionally, Karak is strategically located on the ancient trade routes, contributing to its historical significance Transfer to south to Aqaba, where the Red Sea's inviting waters await. This itinerary seamlessly blends nature, history, and coastal relaxation O/N Aqaba Hotel .

Breakfast at the camp in Wadi Rum, which is well known as “the Valley of the Moon “. Here you will find adventure and feel the romance of the Arabian desert. Wadi Rum is like a moonscape of ancient valleys and towering weathered sandstone mountains rising out of white and pink colored sands. you will go for 2- hour jeep tour to explore Lawrence of Arabia road . Visit the most spectacular sights of Wadi Rum with your guide. You will view sand dunes, graffiti, inscriptions and canyons. Transfer to the lowest point on earth, located 400 meters below sea level. Possibility of bathroom. Dinner and accommodation.

packages.overview:
• ​Amman - the capitalof Jordan ; a fascinating city of contrasts – a unique blend of old and new
  • Mount Nebo –The memorial place of Moses
  • Madaba – St. George’s Church and the mosaic map of the Holy Land.
  • Petra – thespectacular Rose- Red city of the ancientNabateans and one of the world’s seven
    wonders (Petra)
  • Wadi Rum – thehome of Lawrence Of Arabia,also known as the valley of the moon
  • Dead Sea – unique swimming experience in buoyant water at the lowest point on the Earth.Take
    advantage of the useful Dead Sea rich mineralsand mud.

After breakfast, begin your journey with a visit to the Orthodox Church of Saint George in Madaba, home to the famous mosaic map of Palestine. Continue to Mount Nebo, where you’ll enjoy breathtaking views of the Jordan Valley and the Dead Sea. This sacred site marks the place where Moses saw the Promised Land before his death. Proceed to the historic city of Karak, renowned for its impressive 12th-century Crusader castle perched on a hilltop. Explore the castle and learn about the city’s rich history along ancient trade routes. Later, continue to Petra for dinner and an overnight stay at the hotel.

After breakfast, spend the day exploring Petra, the magnificent pink city and former capital of the Nabataeans. Discover its most iconic monuments carved into rose-red rock, including the world-famous Treasury—featured in the Indiana Jones films—the Royal Tombs, and the Colored Tombs. Petra is truly one of the must-visit wonders of the world. After the visit, depart for Wadi Rum, the majestic desert once traversed by Lawrence of Arabia. Embark on a thrilling 2-hour 4x4 Jeep tour led by local Bedouins through the striking lunar landscape, where granite massifs and pink sands create surreal natural formations. Continue to Aqaba for dinner and overnight accommodation.

packages.overview:
Arrival in Amman and city tour featuring Islamic sites and companions’ tombs.

Explore Ajloun Castle and visit the shrines of revered Islamic figures.

Visit Jerash’s Roman ruins and continue to more Sahaba shrines near Amman.

Discover the Dead Sea, Prophet Lot’s Cave, and companions’ tombs in the Jordan Valley.

Tour Salt to visit the shrines of Prophets Shu’ayb, Yusha, Ayyoub, and nearby Sahaba.

Journey to Kerak for Mu’tah battlefield, martyrs’ tombs, Prophet Nuh’s shrine, and Kerak Castle.

Departure from Amman with fond memories of Jordan’s Islamic heritage.

[{"city":"Amman","country":"Jordan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Amman/1744968605737-AdobeStock_129962293.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Amman/1744968606249-AdobeStock_190604000.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Jordan/Amman/1744968606276-AdobeStock_259086143.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"QAIA – city tour of Amman (The Citadel, the Roman Theater, Al-Husseini Mosque, King Abdullah Mosque, Abdul-","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Queen Alia International Airport in Amman, you will be warmly welcomed by our Travelxploria representative for visa assistance. Begin your exploration of Amman with visits to the Citadel, home to ancient ruins including the Temple of Hercules, Umayyad Palace, and a Byzantine church, followed by the Roman Theatre and Al Husseini Mosque. Visit the stunning King Abdullah Mosque, then proceed to the shrines of revered companions: Abdul-Rahman bin Awf, Bilal bin Rabah, and the sacred site of Kahf Al-Raqim (Cave of the Seven Sleepers). Conclude the day with hotel check-in, dinner, and overnight stay in Amman.

Al –Khadir tombs . Ajloun Islamic Castle, 'Ikremah Bin Abi Jahl Tomb -Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at your hotel in Amman, embark on a scenic drive north toward Ajloun, passing through lush pine forests and olive groves. Visit the impressive Ajloun Castle, a 12th-century fortress built by Usama bin Munqith, nephew of Saladin, to defend against Crusader attacks. Admire its Islamic architecture, towers, and panoramic hilltop views. Nearby, visit the tomb of ‘Ikrimah bin Abi Jahl, a former enemy turned devout companion of the Prophet , martyred at Yarmouk. Also, explore the revered shrine of Al-Khadir (St. George), associated with divine miracles and cited in the Holy Quran. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – The Dead Sea (Prophet Lot) – The Jordan valley-Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at your hotel in Amman, drive to the Dead Sea, the lowest point on Earth at 400 meters below sea level. Famous for its high salt and mineral content, the Dead Sea’s waters have been valued for their healing properties since the time of Herod the Great. Enjoy floating effortlessly in its buoyant waters or relax at nearby health spas and luxury resorts. Visit the historic Lot’s Cave, where Prophet Lot took refuge, and see ruins and mosaics linked to his story, mentioned in both the Quran and Bible. Continue to the Jordan Valley to visit the tombs of several revered companions of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH), including Abu Ubeida Amer bin Al-Jarrah, Mo’ath bin Jabal, Shurhabil bin Hasanah, Amir bin Abi Waqqas, and Derar bin Al-Azwar—prominent figures who played key roles in early Islamic history and battles. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – Salt (Tombs of Prophet Shu'ayb , prophet Ayyoub , Prophet Yosha , and Maysarah Ben Masrouq Al- 'Abssi –Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at your hotel in Amman, drive northwest to Salt, once the capital of Jordan during Ottoman rule and a key administrative center. Wander through its charming streets lined with dazzling houses featuring distinctive long-arched windows, offering a glimpse into its rich past. Visit significant Islamic sites around Salt, including the modern mosque in Wadi Shu’ayb, home to the shrine of Prophet Ju’ayb (Jethro), father-in-law of Prophet Moses, who preached monotheism and honesty to his people. On a hill west of Salt lies the shrine of Prophet Yusha (Joshua), Moses’ successor who led the conquest of Palestine. Nearby, explore the foundations of an ancient building at Kherbit Ayyoub, marking the tomb of Prophet Ayyub (Job), famed for his patience and faith. Also visit the tomb of venerable companion Maysarah bin Masrouq Al-Abssi in ’Arda, who fought in key battles and led the first Muslim army into Byzantine territory. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – Kerak ( battle of Mu’tah ; tombs of Zaid Bin Harithah, Ja`far Bin Abi Talib, Abdullah Bin Ruwahah ,","day_summary":"

After breakfast in Amman, drive south to Kerak to visit the historic site of the Battle of Mutah (629 A.D.), Prophet Muhammad’s fiercest battle against Byzantine and Ghassanid forces. Visit the tombs of revered companions Zaid bin Harithah, Ja’far bin Abi Talib, and Abdullah bin Ruwahah, all martyred in the battle. Zaid, mentioned by name in the Quran, led the army bravely until his death. Ja’far, known as “the flying Ja’far,” lost his hands but held the banner until he fell, and Abdullah, a devoted soldier and poet, also commanded before his martyrdom. Explore Kerak’s shrines, including those of Prophet Nuh (Noah), Prophet Sulayman (Solomon), and Zaid bin Ali bin Al-Hussein, known for their piety and wisdom. End the day visiting Kerak’s famous Crusader castle, notable for its role in battles against Saladin, and nearby Sobak Castle, which fell to Saladin 75 years after its construction.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Free day in Amman (shopping)","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast at your hotel in Amman, and start your shopping day. Amman offers various shopping opportunities ranging from gold , spice markets and souqs, to modern boutiques presenting the latest fashions and beautiful local handicrafts. You can find all what you need in malls, like Mecca mall and city mall. You can also enjoy shopping in the old markets of downtown Amman . Evening back to hotel for dinner and overnight .

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – QAIA","day_summary":"

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, our TravelXploria representative will assist you with your transfer to Queen Alia International Airport (QAIA) for your departure. We ensure a smooth and comfortable journey as you conclude your memorable trip with us, wishing you safe travels and looking forward to welcoming you again.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Amman","to":"Amman Queen Alia International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.package_name: European Capitals & Cultural Marvels: From Spain to England
packages.overview:
• Spain – A Tapestry of Culture & Heritage
  • Madrid – Explore the Royal Palace, Prado Museum, and Plaza Mayor, experiencing Spain's capital at its finest.
  • Barcelona – Admire Gaudí’s masterpieces like Sagrada Familia and Park Güell, and stroll along La Rambla.
  • Seville – Visit the Alcázar Palace, Seville Cathedral, and experience authentic Flamenco.
  • Valencia – Discover the City of Arts and Sciences and relax on stunning Mediterranean beaches.
  • France – A Stop in Timeless Beauty
  • Paris – Wander through the Champs-Élysées, Eiffel Tower, and Louvre Museum, soaking in French romance.
  • Normandy & Rouen – Walk through history at Mont Saint-Michel, the D-Day beaches, and Rouen Cathedral.
  • England – A Blend of Royalty & Tradition
  • London – Visit the Tower of London, Buckingham Palace, Big Ben, and the British Museum.
    🇬🇧 Durham & Edinburgh – Experience the medieval charm of Durham Cathedral and Scotland’s capital, with its Edinburgh Castle and Royal Mile.
  • Liverpool & Manchester – Discover the home of The Beatles and explore England’s rich industrial heritage.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Plaza Mayor and La Latina, Madrid’s most famous neighborhood for nightlife and tapas restaurants. You can choose to dine at a restaurant of your preference options include Indian, Chinese, Spanish, and Middle Eastern cuisines.

We’ll then visit Retiro Park, a beautiful oasis in the city center, where we’ll see the lake and the Palacio de Cristal. Admission is included to the Santiago Bernabéu Stadium, the home of Real Madrid—considered by many to be the best football club in the world. Enjoy the rest of the afternoon at your leisure. In the evening, we’ll provide a return transfer to the hotel.

We’ll then journey to the serene Poblet Abbey, one of the best-preserved medieval monasteries in the world (tickets included). Finally, we’ll head to Barcelona, where we’ll arrive in the evening.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a panoramic tour of Barcelona, renowned as one of the most fascinating European capitals. This vibrant city, nestled along the Mediterranean Sea, is famous for Gaudi’s modernist architecture, the bustling Ramblas, and its rich history, highlighted by the Universal Exposition and the Olympics hosted here. You´ll have free time in the afternoon. In the evening, we´ll provide a transfer to Maremagnum, a contemporary entertainment and dining complex by the sea, located near Plaza de Colón. Here, you can enjoy a leisurely stroll through the lively area and choose from a variety of dining options.

On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

Around 4:00 p.m., we’ll depart Paris and head to Normandy, arriving in Rouen. You´ll have free time to explore the historic center of this vibrant city, which dates back to Roman times and boasts charming medieval architecture and an impressive Gothic cathedral, offering a delightful blend of history and culture.

Discover London on a panoramic tour with a local guide that showcases the city’s culture and history. You’ll see famous sites such as the Parliament, the River Thames, and Buckingham Palace, where you might witness the iconic Changing of the Guard (depending on the dates). In the evening, we’ll establish a meeting point in Piccadilly to take a stroll through Leicester Square, Chinatown, and Soho, areas renowned for their lively atmosphere, theaters, and entertainment options. At lunchtime, we’ll provide a transfer to Camden, famous for its vibrant and eclectic market, where you can browse items from various cultures. The afternoon is free for you to explore at your leisure.

Our journey will come to an end, leaving you with wonderful and lasting memories.

packages.package_name: Legendary Tour of Morocco, Spain & Portugal
packages.overview:
• Morocco: A land of contrasts, where the bustling souks and ancient medinas of cities like Marrakech and Fes meet the vastness of the Sahara Desert. Explore vibrant markets, historic palaces, and the stunning Atlas Mountains. Morocco is famous for its unique blend of Arab, Berber, and French influences.

  • Spain: Known for its lively culture, stunning architecture, and delicious cuisine, Spain offers everything from the artistic wonders of Barcelona and Madrid to the flamenco rhythms of Seville. Don't miss the beautiful beaches of Costa Brava and the historic allure of Andalusia.

  • Portugal: A country of stunning coastline, charming cities, and rich maritime history. Lisbon offers a mix of traditional and contemporary culture, while Porto is famous for its wine and scenic riverfront. The Algarve region boasts picturesque beaches, and the beautiful landscapes of Madeira and the Azores are perfect for nature lovers.

[{"city":"Casablanca","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Welcome to Casablanca","day_summary":"

Welcome to Morocco! As you step off the plane, our Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you with a warm smile, ensuring a smooth transfer to your hotel. Take in the vibrant energy of Casablanca as you settle in and unwind after your journey. You’ll have some time to relax before embarking on this unforgettable adventure. Later in the day, our guide will personally connect with you, providing all the details for the days ahead. To make your first evening truly special, enjoy a delicious, included dinner.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Mohammed V International Airport","to":"Casablanca","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":706,"h_name":"Oum Palace Hotel & Spa","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Casablanca","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Oum Palace Hotel & Spa/1741160429915-2023-04-12.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Oum Palace Hotel & Spa/1741160429995-20180818_201459.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Casablanca/Oum Palace Hotel & Spa/1741160430033-37.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Safi","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Safi Arrival & Stay","day_summary":"

This morning, we’ll start with an included guided tour of Morocco’s largest city and economic center. We’ll stroll along the grand avenues, visit the beautiful Mohamed V Square with its fountain, Moorish buildings, and palm trees, and walk through the Arab League Park. We’ll also explore the little Medina. Our tour includes admission to the impressive Hassan II Mosque (the only mosque in Morocco open to non-Muslims), located by the sea and featuring a 210-meter-high minaret with laser lights pointing to Mecca. After the tour, you’ll have free time for lunch in the pleasant maritime area of La Corniche. After lunch, we’ll travel to El Jadida. Its citadel (Mazagan) is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, built by the Portuguese in the early sixteenth century. We’ll stroll through its picturesque streets, which retain many traces of the Portuguese era, such as the Manueline-style Church of the Assumption. We’ll also include a visit to the old sixteenth-century cistern. After exploring, our journey will continue to Safi, arriving in the late afternoon. Dinner will be included.

With our guide, we’ll visit Safi, a city renowned for its ceramics, highly prized throughout Morocco for their quality and bright colors. We’ll photograph the Castle of the Sea and its impressive fortress walls, stroll through the charming Medina, and visit the Hill of the Potters with its many shops.


Afterward, we’ll continue to Essaouira. Its walled Medina, facing the sea, is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This beautifully preserved city is a favorite among artists and painters. You’ll have free time for lunch and to wander through its narrow streets, whitewashed houses, and strong walls struck by the waves.


After lunch, we’ll continue along the Atlantic coast, taking in the magnificent landscapes. We’ll make a brief stop in Taghazout, a picturesque small town known for its fishing and popular with surfers. Then, we’ll proceed to Agadir for accommodation, arriving in the evening. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Safi","to":"Agadir","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":713,"h_name":"Atlantic Hôtel","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Agadir","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Agadir/Atlantic Hôtel/1741160753576-Petit dÃ©jeuner - Buffet.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Agadir/Atlantic Hôtel/1741160753683-232A5263.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Agadir/Atlantic Hôtel/1741160753692-232A1490 (2).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Marrakesh","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival to Marrakesh & Stay","day_summary":"

In the morning, you’ll have free time to enjoy the most popular beach destination in the country. Take some time to relax on one of its endless beaches, stroll along the seafront, or shop in its many retail areas.


After lunch, we’ll continue our journey along a scenic highway through the Atlas Mountains to Marrakech. After arriving at the hotel, you will be able to experience a traditional Kalesa ride up to Jemaa el-Fnaa square, famous for its lively and nonstop atmosphere. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Agadir","to":"Marrakesh","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":720,"h_name":"PALM PLAZA MARRAKECH","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Marrakesh","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/PALM PLAZA MARRAKECH/1741161074995-2024-10-23.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/PALM PLAZA MARRAKECH/1741161075095-2024-02-15.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/PALM PLAZA MARRAKECH/1741161075127-h1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Marrakech City Tour","day_summary":"

Today, we´ll explore one of the most fascinating places in the world, the city that gave Morocco its name. Our city tour will take us through its strong walls, the bustling Jemaa el-Fnaa square, the Medina, the Koutoubia Mosque, and the Bahia Palace (tickets included). Afterward, you´ll have free time for lunch (included) and to relax by the pool or in the hotel garden, or to shop in the souks. In the evening, you can join the Fantasy Party, an optional excursion.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Fes","country":"Morocco","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Fes Arrival & Stay","day_summary":"

A long journey awaits us: we’ll depart early for the Ouzoud Falls, a tranquil spot in Morocco, home to the highest waterfalls in Northern Africa (110 meters). Nestled in the Middle Atlas, these falls are framed by spectacular gorges. We’ll enjoy a short boat trip and have lunch at a restaurant with a stunning view of the waterfalls (both included). You’ll have fun watching the macaques (Moroccan monkeys) that live in the area. We’ll then continue to the Southern Atlas, arriving in Fez. Before heading to the hotel, we’ll take in the view of the city from the Marinid tombs (depending on the sunlight, this visit may be scheduled for the following day). Dinner will be included.

We’ll go on a tour of Fez, entering through the Bronze Gates of the Royal Palace and exploring the Jewish quarter, its lively souks, and the Tanners´ Quarter. The cultural capital of the country is renowned for its impressive Medina, which preserves the traditional Arab atmosphere like no other. We’ll conclude our visit with an included lunch at a historic palace in the Medina.



In the afternoon, we’ll journey north through Morocco on a modern highway, reaching Tangier by evening. Dinner will be included.

Free time in Tangier – do you feel like doing some last-minute shopping? We’ll take a ferry back to Spain. The bus will not be on board, so each passenger must take their luggage on the ferry. We’ll arrive in Algeciras or Tarifa and continue to Seville. Arrival will be in the evening.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a city tour of Seville, where you´ll visit the cathedral with its famous Giralda, explore the banks of the Guadalquivir River, and wander through the popular neighborhoods of Santa Cruz and Triana. After the tour, enjoy a relaxing boat ride on the Guadalquivir River offering stunning panoramic views (included). In the evening, you´ll have the option to attend a popular flamenco tablao.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Lisbon","country":"Portugal","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Portugal/Lisbon/1741006482209-istockphoto-538182833-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Portugal/Lisbon/1741006482318-istockphoto-1137863101-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Portugal/Lisbon/1741006482374-istockphoto-694266928-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Lisbon & Stay","day_summary":"

We’ll leave Seville, traveling through pleasant landscapes of rolling hills and expansive pasturelands as we head towards Extremadura. In Mérida, admission is included to the Archaeological Ensemble of Mérida, which features a Roman Theater and Amphitheater. This site is renowned for its excellent preservation and its designation as a World Heritage Site. You´ll have time for lunch and a stroll through the vibrant pedestrian historic center, filled with restaurants and local charm. We will then continue to Portugal, stopping in Évora, another World Heritage Site, known for its whitewashed streets, Renaissance palaces, and cathedral. We’ll arrive in Lisbon in the evening.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a sightseeing tour of Lisbon, exploring the Portuguese capital of the seven hills, with its charming alleys, iconic tiles, the feeling of ¨saudade,¨ and the beautiful Atlantic light. We’ll also visit the Belem neighborhood, from where the great Portuguese navigators set sail to cross the oceans in the 15th century. Free time in the afternoon to walk and go to the Bairro Alto and its viewpoint; if you’d like to, you could take an optional trip to the towns of Sintra, Cascais and Estoril. In the evening, we’ll return to the hotel from the lively Restauradores Square, filled with vibrant bars and cafes.

Meet your Travelxploria representative and embark on an unforgettable journey through the heart of Lisbon. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, explore iconic landmarks such as the Belém Tower, Jerónimos Monastery, and the Monument to the Discoveries. Wander through the charming Alfama district, known for its narrow streets, Fado music, and historic charm, and take in breathtaking views from São Jorge Castle.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss adventure in the scenic city of Zurich.

  • Explore Lucerne and enjoy stunning alpine views from Mount Titlis.

  • Journey to the “Top of Europe” for breathtaking snowy vistas.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris on a comfortable train.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Enjoy a magical day at Disneyland Paris with thrilling rides and entertainment.

  • Shop, dine, or explore more of Paris at your own pace.

  • Bid farewell to Europe with unforgettable memories.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

After breakfast, check out from your Zurich hotel and proceed to the train station for your scenic journey to Paris. packages.overview:
• Touch down in Zurich and settle into the heart of Switzerland.

  • Explore Zurich’s highlights, enjoy a lake cruise, and visit the Lindt Home of Chocolate.

  • Travel to the luxurious alpine resort town of St. Moritz.

  • Embark on a scenic ride aboard the world-famous Glacier Express.

  • Journey from the Matterhorn village to the lakeside city of Geneva.

  • Discover the breathtaking beauty of the French Alps on a full-day excursion.

  • Bid farewell to Switzerland with unforgettable alpine memories.

visit.","day_summary":"

Your Zurich adventure begins as you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, ready to guide you through this stunning Swiss city. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, immerse yourself in Zurich’s rich history, culture, and breathtaking scenery. Stroll along the famous Bahnhofstrasse, explore the charming Old Town, and soak in the tranquil beauty of Lake Zurich. Then, hop aboard a scenic boat cruise, gliding past the city’s picturesque skyline from a whole new perspective. The journey culminates at the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where the secrets of Swiss chocolate-making come to life. Indulge in irresistible tastings and witness the artistry behind Switzerland’s finest confections. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—every detail is expertly handled, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable experience. From history to indulgence, this tour offers the perfect blend of culture, relaxation, and sweet delights.
