After a hearty breakfast in Zurich, check out from your hotel and proceed to the train station for your scenic journey to St. Moritz. The train ride offers a breathtaking introduction to the Swiss Alps, taking you through charming villages, lush valleys, and majestic mountain landscapes. As you ascend into the Engadin region, the air becomes crisper and the views more dramatic. Upon arrival in the luxurious alpine resort town of St. Moritz, check in to your hotel and enjoy the fresh mountain air. Spend the remainder of the day at leisure, exploring the elegant town known for its natural beauty and world-class charm.

Experience the breathtaking beauty of Zermatt and Mt. Gornergrat with your Travelxploria representative, ensuring the most unforgettable journey through the Swiss Alps. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, begin your adventure with a scenic village walk through Zermatt, a charming, car-free town nestled at the base of the legendary Matterhorn. Wander past traditional wooden chalets, historic churches, and vibrant streets before boarding the iconic Gornergrat Railway, Europe’s highest open-air cogwheel train. As you ascend to 3,089 meters, be mesmerized by panoramic views of the Matterhorn and 29 other towering, snow-covered peaks. Capture stunning photographs, breathe in the crisp mountain air, and revel in the serenity of the Alps. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, this once-in-a-lifetime experience blends nature, adventure, and Swiss charm into a journey you’ll cherish forever.

After breakfast in the picturesque mountain village of Zermatt, check out from your hotel and make your way to the train station for a scenic journey to Geneva. The train ride offers stunning views of the Swiss Alps, tranquil lakes, and charming countryside as you descend from the high-altitude serenity of Zermatt to the cosmopolitan elegance of Geneva. Relax in comfort as you travel through some of Switzerland’s most beautiful landscapes. Upon arrival, you’ll be transferred to your hotel. Take the rest of the day to unwind or begin exploring Geneva’s beautiful lakeside promenades, international flair, and historic Old Town.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

Join your Travelxploria representative and expert tour guide for an incredible journey through Germany’s historic Heidelberg, the enchanting Black Forest, and Switzerland’s breathtaking Rhine Falls. Start your day exploring Heidelberg Altstadt, a picturesque old town nestled along the Neckar River, with its medieval charm and the iconic Heidelberg Castle towering above. Stroll through cobblestone streets and visit the stunning Church of the Holy Spirit. Next, venture into the heart of the Black Forest, where you’ll be captivated by its lush landscapes and charming villages. Experience a live demonstration of traditional cuckoo clock craftsmanship, a true Black Forest specialty. Later, travel to Schaffhausen to witness the mighty Rhine Falls, Europe’s largest waterfall, where cascading waters create a mesmerizing spectacle. After a day of exploration, unwind at your hotel in Central Switzerland. Travelxploria, the best travel agency, ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Overnight stay with Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner.

A Majestic Alpine Experience Enjoy the tour’s crowning jewel with Travelxploria the best travel agency as we take you on an enchanting alpine adventure to Jungfraujoch, \"The Top of Europe,\" paired with the breathtaking beauty of Interlaken. After a delightful breakfast, journey to Interlaken, a picturesque Swiss town nestled between two stunning lakes, offering spectacular mountain views. Accompanied by our expert Travelxploria representative and guide, embark on an unforgettable ride aboard the Eiger Express and cogwheel train to Jungfraujoch, Europe’s highest railway station. Witness the awe-inspiring Aletsch Glacier, explore the Ice Palace, and admire panoramic views from the Sphinx Observatory. After a delicious lunch, return to Central Switzerland for overnight stay, followed by a sumptuous dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" A Swiss Dream: Soaring Heights & Timeless Charm ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on a thrilling alpine adventure to Mt. Titlis. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, enjoy the journey to the world’s first rotating cable car, Rotair, offering mesmerizing 360-degree views of snow-covered peaks and deep glacial crevasses. Conquer the exhilarating Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge, before indulging in a delightful lunch. Afterward, enjoy a guided exploration of Lucerne’s iconic landmarks, including the Lion Monument and Kapellbrücke. Take some free time for shopping, then savor a delicious dinner at your hotel in Central Switzerland, completing a day filled with adventure, culture, and stunning landscapes.

From the scenic views to the cultural explorations, you'll carry these cherished memories home. We hope to see you again soon for your next adventure with Travelxploria – the best travel agency.

packages.overview:
• France – Wander through the romantic streets of Paris, marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame, and visit the historic charm of Rouen.
  • United Kingdom – Experience the royal grandeur of London, explore the medieval beauty of Durham, admire Edinburgh’s castles, and soak in the vibrant culture of Glasgow, Liverpool, and Dublin.
  • Netherlands – Discover the picturesque canals and rich artistic heritage of Amsterdam, home to Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House.
  • Belgium – Stroll through the medieval squares of Brussels and Bruges, and indulge in world-famous Belgian chocolates and waffles.
  • Germany – Explore the historic sites of Berlin, the fairytale castles of Bavaria, and the cultural vibrance of Frankfurt and Cologne.
  • Switzerland – Witness the Swiss Alps’ breathtaking beauty, visit Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and enjoy a scenic ride on the Glacier Express.
  • Italy – Step back in time with the Colosseum in Rome, explore the romantic canals of Venice, admire Florence’s Renaissance art, and relax on the stunning coastline of Amalfi.
  • Spain – Immerse in the artistic and architectural wonders of Barcelona and Madrid, experience the passion of flamenco in Seville, and soak up the sun in Costa del Sol.
  • Austria – Enjoy the imperial beauty of Vienna, the musical heritage of Salzburg, and the stunning landscapes of Innsbruck.

[{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Rome","day_summary":"

Welcome to Rome! As you arrive in the Eternal City, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. After you’ve settled in, our guide will personally meet you, sharing essential details about your journey ahead. You can also find helpful information at the hotel reception. In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, a perfect introduction to Rome’s vibrant atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets and explore a variety of restaurants, setting the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome Fiumicino Airport","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Florence","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1747246882990-AdobeStock_260554885-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289621-istockphoto-1088920100-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289665-istockphoto-1136673014-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Rome to Florence","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome","to":"Florence","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":678,"h_name":"Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Florence","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956443-2024-07-01 (2).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956518-unnamed (40).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956623-2023-01-18.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Venice","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336475-istockphoto-1200916277-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336571-istockphoto-1388018793-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336619-istockphoto-911570904-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Florence to Venice","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Florence","to":"Venice","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":659,"h_name":"Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Venice","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438755-unnamed (15).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438824-unnamed (14).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438859-unnamed (13).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Venice to Innsbruck to Zurich","day_summary":"

We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Venice","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Zurich to Lucerne to Zurich","day_summary":"

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paris","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976316-istockphoto-689710224-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976390-istockphoto-135034702-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976428-istockphoto-847408280-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741635794864-AdobeStock_730104594-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Strasbourgh to Paris","day_summary":"

We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":681,"h_name":"Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535200-5175-11-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535319-5175-16-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535355-unnamed (43).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Paris City Tour","day_summary":"

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise Experience","day_summary":"

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to this incredible journey. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any last-minute needs, ensuring a smooth departure. As you reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from historic landmarks to breathtaking landscapes, we hope you take home not just souvenirs, but cherished memories that will last a lifetime. Though this adventure comes to an end, the stories and moments shared will stay with you forever.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Paris","to":"Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
Explore Thailand’s Best with Travelxploria: Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket

Embark on an unforgettable adventure through Thailand’s most vibrant destinations with Travelxploria. Begin your journey in Bangkok, the bustling capital city known for its lively street life, ornate temples, and vibrant culture. Visit iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace, the majestic Wat Arun, and the Wat Phra Kaew Temple, home to the revered Emerald Buddha. Experience the charm of Chao Phraya River cruises and indulge in shopping at markets like Chatuchak and Asiatique.

Next, head to Pattaya, a coastal city renowned for its beautiful beaches and lively entertainment. Relax at Jomtien Beach, visit the stunning Sanctuary of Truth, and enjoy the breathtaking Pattaya Viewpoint. Don’t miss the famous Coral Island, where you can enjoy water sports like snorkeling and parasailing, or explore the undersea world on a glass-bottom boat ride.

Your journey continues to Phuket, Thailand’s tropical paradise. Explore Patong Beach for its lively nightlife or unwind at the serene Kata and Karon Beaches. Discover Phang Nga Bay’s limestone cliffs, and enjoy a memorable boat ride to the stunning James Bond Island. Experience the cultural richness of Old Phuket Town and enjoy a relaxing day at Phuket’s Big Buddha, with panoramic views of the island.

Whether you’re seeking adventure, relaxation, or cultural immersion, this Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket tour offers an unforgettable experience of Thailand’s diverse beauty.

Welcome to Thailand! Upon landing at Bangkok Airport, a Travelxploria representative will warmly greet you and escort you on a comfortable drive to Pattaya. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and take some time to relax. Later, visit the awe-inspiring Sanctuary of Truth, a masterpiece of intricate wood carvings reflecting Thai craftsmanship and spiritual heritage. Stroll along the golden shores of Jomtien Beach, feeling the gentle sea breeze as the sun sets. Conclude your day with a visit to Art in Paradise Museum, where stunning 3D artwork brings imagination to life. Return to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, it's time to continue your journey. After checking out, a Travelxploria representative will assist you with a smooth transfer to Bangkok in a comfortable vehicle. Enjoy the scenic drive as you leave the coastal charm behind and head toward Thailand’s bustling capital. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and take some time to unwind.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

packages.package_name: Uncover the Charm of Thailand Islands
packages.overview:
Discover Thailand’s Best with Travelxploria: Phi Phi Islands, Koh Samui, and Bangkok Adventure

Experience the vibrant charm of Thailand with Travelxploria on a tour that takes you from the crystal-clear waters of Phi Phi Islands to the serene beauty of Koh Samui and the cultural wonders of Bangkok.

Start your journey with a thrilling Phi Phi Island Tour. Cruise through the turquoise waters and visit Maya Bay, famous for its stunning scenery. Explore the awe-inspiring Viking Cave, a hidden gem, and enjoy unforgettable moments amidst the islands’ natural beauty.

Next, head to Koh Samui, Thailand’s second-largest island. Unwind at a luxurious resort, indulge in the lively nightlife at Ark Bar, and take in the island’s charm. Embark on a sightseeing tour to the iconic Big Buddha, the sacred Wat Khunaram, and the breathtaking vistas of Ang Thong Marine Park, a paradise of pristine beaches and emerald lagoons.

Your journey concludes in Bangkok, Thailand’s capital, where you’ll dive into the rich heritage of the city. Visit the majestic Grand Palace, the serene Wat Pho, and the iconic Wat Arun, capturing the essence of Thailand’s cultural treasures.

This tour offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and heritage, ensuring a memorable experience of Thailand’s most captivating destinations.

Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
• James Bond Island – Cruise through emerald waters, explore iconic caves, and relish a delicious seafood lunch onboard.
  • Pattaya Transfer – Fly to Pattaya, unwind at your hotel, and embrace the vibrant coastal vibes.
  • Coral Island – Bask in the sun, dive into thrilling water sports, and enjoy a scenic beachfront lunch.
  • Bangkok City Tour – Marvel at the Golden Buddha, visit Gems Gallery, and admire the Marble Temple’s architecture.
  • Dreamworld & Snow Town – Experience thrilling rides, magical lands, and a snowy winter wonderland in tropical Bangkok.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

After breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative greets you at your hotel lobby and leads you on a captivating half-day tour through the heart of Bangkok. The adventure continues at the dazzling Gems Gallery, where you are mesmerized by a vibrant display of cultural treasures and sparkling history. After a hearty breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative meets you at your hotel lobby, setting the stage for a day of wonder at Dream World Bangkok. Your adventure begins as you’re whisked away to a land where imagination meets thrill—a place where roller coaster loops and enchanting themed zones effortlessly transport you back to the magic of childhood. Lose yourself in a vibrant world of exhilarating rides and captivating shows, each corner designed to spark joy and fuel your sense of adventure. With seamless transfers and an atmosphere brimming with excitement, this tour promises an unforgettable escape into the heart of Bangkok’s most playful amusement park.

Experience a magical winter escape at Snow Town, where you can enjoy snowball fights, sledding, and ice skating in a charming snowy setting. Feel the thrill of winter activities in the heart of Bangkok. After a fun-filled adventure, our representative will ensure a comfortable transfer back to your hotel for a relaxing overnight stay.

packages.overview:
• Tiger Park Pattaya – Experience the thrill of close encounters with majestic tigers, capturing unforgettable moments with these incredible creatures.
  • Alcazar Cabaret Show – Be mesmerized by a dazzling display of music, dance, and culture in a vibrant, high-energy performance.
  • Coral Island Tour – Escape to pristine beaches, soak in the sun, or dive into thrilling water adventures in turquoise waters.
  • Underwater World Pattaya – Walk through a mesmerizing underwater tunnel, surrounded by exotic marine life and colorful coral reefs.
  • Bangkok City & Temple Tour – Explore the cultural heart of Bangkok, visiting iconic temples and historic landmarks.
  • Chao Phraya Princess Dinner Cruise – Sail along the illuminated skyline of Bangkok, enjoying a luxurious dinner with live entertainment.
  • Safari World & Marine Park – Witness fascinating wildlife, thrilling animal shows, and up-close encounters with exotic species.

[{"city":"Pattaya","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961601818-AdobeStock_174974335.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604012-AdobeStock_366309928.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604111-AdobeStock_1091251878.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive Pattaya with Visit to Tiger Park & Alcazar Show in Evening","day_summary":"

As you arrive at Bangkok Airport, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, who will ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel in Pattaya. Sit back and relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you journey through scenic landscapes toward the vibrant coastal city.

Get up close with majestic tigers at Tiger Park Pattaya on this thrilling experience, brought to you by Travelxploria,Enjoy a hassle-free hotel pick-up, accompanied by our representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring a safe and memorable visit. Walk among these incredible big cats and capture once-in-a-lifetime photos as you interact with tigers of various sizes in a well-maintained, ethical environment. Learn about their care, behavior, and conservation efforts while experiencing a unique wildlife encounter. After an exhilarating day, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off, making this adventure smooth and enjoyable. With the best on-ground support staff, this tour guarantees the ultimate wildlife experience in Pattaya.

Experience the magic of Pattaya’s world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show with seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off by your Travelxploria representative.We ensure an unforgettable evening with the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide. Witness a dazzling spectacle of glamorous performances, extravagant costumes, and mesmerizing choreography in a state-of-the-art theater. This high-energy cabaret show blends Thai culture with global influences, creating a visual masterpiece that will leave you in awe. Sit back, relax, and enjoy a night of entertainment, music, and vibrant performances. After the show, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off at your hotel making your Pattaya experience will be truly unforgettable.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

Dive into an enchanting underwater experience with Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, as we take you on a journey through Underwater World Pattaya. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pick-up, accompanied by our representative and expert tour guide, ensuring you have the best experience. Walk through the stunning 100-meter-long acrylic tunnel, where vibrant marine life surrounds you on all sides. Discover a variety of sea creatures, from graceful stingrays to majestic sharks, and even enjoy interactive feeding sessions. Whether you’re a marine enthusiast or simply looking for a fun and educational experience, this aquarium promises excitement for all ages. After a memorable adventure, relax as we provide a comfortable hotel drop-off making memories truly unforgettable.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out and ensure a smooth transfer to Bangkok. Relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you travel through scenic routes toward Thailand’s vibrant capital. Along the way, take in glimpses of local life, bustling markets, and lush landscapes. Upon arrival, you will check-in at your hotel

Our Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

packages.package_name: Tropical Wonders and City Lights of Thailand
packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you on a vibrant journey through Thailand’s cultural and coastal treasures. Step into the whimsical world of Art in Paradise, Thailand’s only 3D illusion museum, for a playful start. Escape to Coral Island’s pristine shores, where crystal-clear waters and beachside adventures await. In Bangkok, sail along the Chao Phraya River on a magical dinner cruise, enjoying dazzling city views under the stars. Discover Bangkok’s rich heritage with a guided tour of its grand temples and palaces, creating memories that blend art, relaxation, and tradition.

After collecting your luggage, sit back and relax as we embark on a scenic drive to Pattaya, Thailand’s famous resort city. Enjoy the changing landscapes, from Bangkok’s bustling streets to Pattaya’s lively coastline. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and unwind after your journey.

Step into a world of illusion at Art in Paradise Pattaya, Thailand’s largest interactive 3D art museum, with Travelxploria, the leading travel agency in Thailand. Enjoy a hassle-free experience with hotel pick-up, guided by our friendly representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring you make the most of this immersive attraction. Walk through stunning hand-painted 3D artworks that let you become part of the scene—pose with wild animals, step into famous landmarks, or float in surreal landscapes. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, this experience promises endless creativity, fun, and unforgettable memories.

Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you on an immersive journey through the heart of Indochina, where timeless traditions and resilient spirits come alive at every turn. In Vietnam, you’ll glide aboard a private junk through the emerald karsts of Ha Long Bay, kayak beneath towering limestone pillars, and savor the bold flavors of street-side pho and banh mi with a local chef by your side. In the Mekong Delta, our expert guides will navigate you through lush canals on a traditional sampan, introducing you to floating-market vendors and family-run orchards heavy with tropical fruit. Crossing into Cambodia, you’ll dawn-visit the sublime terraces of Angkor Wat as the sun gilds its ancient stones, wander through jungle-cloaked temples with an archaeologist-guide decoding centuries-old bas-reliefs, and taste fragrant amok curry at a riverside village homestay. Along the way, Travelxploria handles every detail—seamless border transfers, boutique and heritage-style accommodations, hands-on cultural workshops, and insider access to wartime landmarks and colonial gems—so you can simply lose yourself in the beauty, history, and warmth of Vietnam and Cambodia.

[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Ho Chi Minh Arrival – Ho Chi Minh Half Day Tour With Lunch","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Good morning, Da Nang! After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ba Na Hills, located just 25 km from Da Nang city center. Enjoy a scenic 35-minute drive to the Ba Na Hills Mountain Base, where your adventure begins. Upon arrival, check in at the Cable Car Station to experience the world’s longest cable car route. As you ascend, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the lush mountains, rolling hills, and the majestic Truong Son Mountain Range. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Bridge, an architectural marvel held up by giant stone hands, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscapes. Continue exploring the charming Old French Villas, visit Nui Chua, and conquer the mountain peak at an altitude of 1,487 meters. Next, board the mountain climbing train to visit the Flower Garden, home to a vibrant collection of beautiful blossoms. Then, explore Linh Ung Pagoda, where Travelxploria’s guide will share insights into Buddhism and the cultural significance of this sacred site. Visit the Wine Tunnel, where you can see a collection of aged wines stored for many years. Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at a restaurant before heading to Fantasy Park Amusement Center. Have fun with various thrilling games and 4D movies—most of the attractions are included in your tour package, except for games with prizes, which require an additional fee. After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the main gate and transfer to Da Nang city. On the way, pass by the famous Dragon Bridge for a quick photo stop before enjoying shopping at Han Market, a popular spot for souvenirs, handicrafts, and local specialties.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Krong Siem Reap\"]","inserted_id":"[671]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Krong Siem Reap/Hanoi – Siem Reap By Flight/1745395214947-Hanoi â Siem Reap 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Krong Siem Reap/Hanoi – Siem Reap By Flight/1745395215100-Hanoi â Siem Reap 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Krong Siem Reap/Hanoi – Siem Reap By Flight/1745395215201-Hanoi â Siem Reap.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day Angkor Thom & Ta Prohm & Angkor Wat ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide to explore the world’s greatest monument—Angkor Wat. Unlike most temples in Cambodia that face east, Angkor Wat is uniquely oriented to the west. As the largest temple in the world, its immense stone structure rivals the Cheops Pyramid in Egypt. Continue your adventure by exploring the Great Angkor City of the Khmer Empire, a symbol of its golden era. Begin at the South Gate of Angkor Thom, where you can admire the breathtaking view of the Tonle Om River encircling the entire city. Next, visit the Bayon Temple, the magnificent state Buddhist temple built in the late 12th or early 13th century by Great King Jayavarman VII. Standing at the heart of Angkor Thom City, Bayon is a stunningly ornate Khmer temple known for its serene stone faces. Inside the palace enclosure, explore Baphuon Temple, an 11th-century mountain temple dedicated to Shiva, built during the reign of Suryavarman I. Admire its intricate carvings that cover nearly every surface. Next, visit The Terrace of the Elephants, used by King Jayavarman VII as a grand platform to review his victorious returning army. Then, explore the Terrace of the Leper King, named after a 15th-century statue believed to represent Yama, the Hindu god of death. After an enriching morning, take a break to relax and recharge with a delicious meal at a Khmer local restaurant near Srah Srang (at your own expense), where you can savor authentic Cambodian cuisine. In the afternoon, uncover one of Angkor’s most mystical and hidden gems—the Ta Prohm Temple. Known as Rajavihara in ancient times, this late 12th-century Bayon-style temple is famous for its massive tree roots intertwined with the ruins, creating a breathtakingly photogenic and atmospheric setting. It remains one of the most beloved temples in Angkor, offering a truly magical experience. As the day winds down, make your way to the top of Bakheng Mountain for a stunning panoramic sunset view from the Hindu mountain temple. Witness the golden hues of the setting sun casting a mystical glow over the Angkor landscape, creating an unforgettable moment. Finally, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your selected hotel, where you can relax and enjoy your own leisure time.

packages.package_name: Northern Vietnam Unveiled: Heritage, Nature & Serenity
packages.overview:
Discover Northern Vietnam with Travelxploria: Hanoi, Ha Long Bay & Ninh Binh

Step into the heart of Northern Vietnam on an unforgettable journey curated by Travelxploria, where ancient charm, natural beauty, and rich culture come together seamlessly. Begin your adventure in Hanoi, the vibrant capital that pulses with history and life—wander through the bustling Old Quarter’s narrow lanes, admire French colonial architecture, and witness centuries-old traditions at the Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum.

From the city's energy, escape to the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site famed for its dramatic limestone islands and hidden caves. Cruise aboard a traditional junk boat, kayak through peaceful lagoons, and watch the sunset paint the bay in golden hues.

Next, journey to the serene landscapes of Ninh Binh, often called "Ha Long Bay on land." Glide through lush rice fields and towering karsts on a sampan boat in Tam Coc, explore ancient temples in Hoa Lu—the former royal capital—and soak in panoramic views from Mua Cave's summit.

With every detail managed by Travelxploria—from guided city tours and luxury cruises to local culinary experiences and seamless transfers—this Northern Vietnam escape promises a perfect blend of discovery, relaxation, and cultural immersion.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel to begin your full-day Hanoi city tour. Your first stop is the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ba Dinh Square and admire the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays, but still viewable from the outside). Enjoy a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (exterior view), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the iconic One Pillar Pagoda. Next, explore the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, where Confucius is worshiped and generations of scholars were trained. In the afternoon, visit Tran Quoc Pagoda, the oldest pagoda in Vietnam, before stopping at the grand Hanoi Opera House for photos. Stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake and enjoy free shopping at Dong Xuan Market and surrounding streets, filled with specialty shops.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

packages.overview:
Feel the warm sun on your face as you step into Vietnam’s kaleidoscope of wonders—each moment a new page in your personal travel story. With Travelxploria as your guide, you’ll glide past emerald rice terraces in Sapa aboard a private air-conditioned coach, the morning mist swirling around terraces that seem sculpted by ancient hands. We’ll sail you through Ha Long Bay’s otherworldly limestone karsts on a luxury junk, where a chef prepares a feast of freshly caught seafood as the sun dips below the horizon in a blaze of amber and gold.

In Hanoi’s Old Quarter, our expert local storyteller leads you down winding lantern-lit alleyways to hidden pho stalls and rooftop cafés, sharing tales of emperors and revolutionaries as you sip on egg coffee. Then trade the city buzz for the rhythmic waterways of the Mekong Delta—paddle a sampan past coconut groves, barter for exotic fruits at floating markets, and toast with orchard farmers over fresh sugar-cane juice.

Finally, let Travelxploria carry you off to Phu Quoc’s powdery beaches, where a beachfront villa awaits with chilled cocktails and silk-soft sands under a canopy of stars. From seamless first-class flights and boutique accommodations to intimate encounters with Vietnam’s vibrant heart, every detail is curated so you can simply lose—and find—yourself in this land of timeless charm.

[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival Ho Chi Minh – Half Day City Tour","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Your journey begins with a smooth flight from Ho Chi Minh to the tropical paradise of Phu Quoc, where our Travelxploria representative awaits to welcome you. From the moment you land, everything is effortlessly arranged for your comfort. Our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you on a fascinating half-day city tour, uncovering the island’s hidden gems. Explore the vibrant Dinh Cau Night Market, marvel at the island’s stunning beaches, and visit iconic landmarks like the Ho Quoc Pagoda. Throughout the journey, our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience, from seamless transfers to personalized assistance. packages.overview: Vietnam is a captivating country where rich history, stunning landscapes, and vibrant culture come together, offering everything from bustling cities to peaceful countryside. Its breathtaking natural beauty stretches from the limestone karsts of Ha Long Bay to Sapa’s lush rice terraces, while its resilience is reflected in ancient temples, colonial architecture, and wartime relics. Whether savoring bold flavors in dishes like pho and banh mi, exploring Ho Chi Minh City’s dynamic streets, or unwinding on Phu Quoc’s pristine beaches, Vietnam enchants visitors with its warmth, charm, and timeless traditions.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel to begin your full-day Hanoi city tour. Your first stop is the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ba Dinh Square and admire the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays, but still viewable from the outside). Enjoy a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (exterior view), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the iconic One Pillar Pagoda. Next, explore the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, where Confucius is worshiped and generations of scholars were trained. In the afternoon, visit Tran Quoc Pagoda, the oldest pagoda in Vietnam, before stopping at the grand Hanoi Opera House for photos. Stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake and enjoy free shopping at Dong Xuan Market and surrounding streets, filled with specialty shops.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Hanoi\"]","inserted_id":"[229]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI – FULL DAY CITY TOUR /1740643165353-Tran Quoc Pagoda vietnam.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI – FULL DAY CITY TOUR /1740643165428-Tran Quoc Pagoda vietnam 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI – FULL DAY CITY TOUR /1740643165467-Tran Quoc Pagoda vietnam 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI – FULL DAY CITY TOUR /1740643165540-Tran Quoc Pagoda vietnam 2.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Ninh Binh Tour","day_summary":"

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

packages.package_name: Wonders of Vietnam: From Saigon to Sapa
packages.overview:
Explore Vietnam with Travelxploria – A Journey Through Culture, Nature & Timeless Charm

Vietnam is a land where every landscape tells a story and every street hums with life. With Travelxploria, discover a Southeast Asian gem known for its breathtaking natural wonders, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to the emerald rice terraces of Sapa and the tranquil shores of Da Nang, Vietnam’s beauty unfolds in every direction.

Step back in time as you explore ancient temples, French colonial avenues, and poignant war-era landmarks—each offering insight into a nation shaped by resilience and heritage. In the dynamic cities of Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh, tradition meets modernity, where bustling street markets, motorbike-packed avenues, and rooftop cafes coexist in perfect harmony.

And of course, no journey is complete without tasting Vietnam’s world-famous cuisine—bursting with fresh herbs, bold flavors, and stories in every dish. From warm smiles to cultural riches, Vietnam welcomes you with open arms.

Let’s fly to your dream destination—with Travelxploria, your Vietnam adventure awaits.

[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival Ho Chi Minh & Half Day City Tour ","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, along with our driver, will pick you up at your hotel to begin the Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Upon arrival, you will watch a documentary film revealing the mystery behind the Cu Chi Tunnels, showcasing how they were constructed and how locals survived in harsh wartime conditions. Explore the intricate tunnel system, designed to withstand powerful bomb attacks, and discover Hoang Cam's smoke-less stove, secret hideouts, fighting bunkers, and dangerous booby traps. You will also visit a rice paper workshop and taste special tea and cassava, the staple food of guerrilla fighters during the war. Take a break and, if you wish, try shooting Vietnam War-era weapons like the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 light machine gun. After finishing the tour, the bus will take you back to your hotel. Later, our private driver will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Upon arrival, our representative will be there to pick you up and transfer you to your hotel for check-in.

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before starting your adventure with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide. At 08:30, our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you’ll take a breathtaking cable car ride to the summit, admiring panoramic views along the way. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden featuring a variety of vibrant blooms. Next, take another cable car ride to the enchanting French Village, situated at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its unique European-style architecture. In the afternoon, enjoy thrilling games at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most attractions, including a 4D movie experience, are included in the tour package. However, certain games with rewards may require an additional fee. After an exciting day, take the cable car back to the base and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative and driver will warmly welcome you and transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Early risers are in for a treat as they witness the breathtaking sunrise over the tranquil waters of Ha Long Bay. Enjoy the peaceful seascape and start your morning with an invigorating Tai Chi session on the sundeck, guided by experienced instructors. After a light breakfast, continue your cruise journey, taking in the mesmerizing limestone formations and capturing stunning photographs. 8:30 AM: After a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide and driver will take you to the Cable Car Station, where you will enjoy a breathtaking 20-minute cable car ride with spectacular mountain scenery. 9:30 AM: Arriving at an altitude of 2,800 meters, take in the panoramic views, visit the spiritual pagoda, and trek up 600 steps to reach the peak of Fansipan – the Roof of Indochina. Spend approximately 1.5 hours hiking and capturing stunning photographs. 12:00 PM: Return to the Cable Car Station and head back to Sapa town, where the rest of the day is yours to explore at leisure. For an unforgettable cultural experience, we highly recommend visiting the Love Market on Saturday night, a unique gathering of ethnic minorities such as the H’mong and Dao people, showcasing the rich traditions of Lao Cai and Northwest Vietnam. Stay overnight at Sapa Relax Hotel, ensuring a comfortable and restful night.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a captivating Southeast Asian country celebrated for its breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to Sapa’s terraced rice fields and Da Nang’s serene beaches, its natural beauty is truly mesmerizing. The country’s history comes alive through ancient temples, French colonial architecture, and war-era landmarks. Bustling cities like Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City blend tradition with modern energy, featuring lively markets and dynamic nightlife. With its world-renowned cuisine and warm hospitality, Vietnam offers an unforgettable experience.

Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with our professional driver. Sit back and relax as we take you on a comfortable 50-minute transfer to Hanoi city. (Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.
