Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. At 8:30 AM, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up for an exciting city tour. Begin with a visit to Linh Ung Pagoda and the majestic Marble Mountains before driving to Hoi An for a delightful lunch. In the afternoon, experience a unique basket boat ride at Bay Mau Palm Garden, followed by an exploration of Hoi An Ancient Town, a historic international trading port from the 16th century. Discover iconic sites like the Japanese Covered Bridge, Fujian Assembly Hall, Tan Ky Old House, and Hoi An Central Market. Enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Hoi An before returning to your hotel in Da Nang for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":246,"a_name":"Da Nang Arrival + Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town ","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Da Nang","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. 08:30 AM: Our Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you will take a scenic cable car ride to the summit, enjoying breathtaking panoramic views. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden showcasing a variety of colorful blooms. Continue your journey by taking another cable car to the French Village, located at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its charming European-style architecture. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and 4D movie experiences are included in the tour package (some prize-winning games may require an additional fee). After an exciting day, take the cable car back down and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival in Ho Chi Minh City, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you, and our private driver will transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

08:30 AM: After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will meet you in the lobby and accompany you on a one-and-a-half-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels. This intricate 200km-long tunnel network served as a vital shelter for guerrillas during the war against American troops and stands as a remarkable testament to human resilience and ingenuity. Explore this historical site and gain insights into Vietnam’s wartime past before returning to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy your free time until the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver pick you up and transfer you to the airport for your departure flight home, concluding your memorable journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":244,"a_name":"Cu Chi Tunnel Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Ho Chi Minh","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":"[\"null\"]","a_details":"

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview:
Vietnam is a land of breathtaking contrasts and captivating beauty—where ancient traditions meet modern rhythms, and nature’s wonders stretch from mountains to sea. With Travelxploria, explore a Southeast Asian gem that tells its story through every landscape, temple, and bustling street corner.

Cruise through the ethereal limestone islets of Halong Bay, trek through the misty terraced hills of Sapa, and unwind on the sun-kissed beaches of Da Nang. Dive into history as you visit ancient pagodas, colonial-era architecture, and poignant war memorials that speak to the resilience of a proud nation.

In Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City, experience the vibrant pulse of Vietnamese life, where traditional street markets and age-old customs blend seamlessly with the buzz of scooters and the sparkle of rooftop cafes. And throughout your journey, indulge in Vietnam’s world-famous cuisine and the warm, genuine hospitality of its people.

With Travelxploria, your Vietnam experience is thoughtfully curated—blending discovery, comfort, and cultural immersion.
Let’s fly to your dream destination—Vietnam is waiting to inspire you.

(Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. At 8:30 AM, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up for an exciting city tour. Begin with a visit to Linh Ung Pagoda and the majestic Marble Mountains before driving to Hoi An for a delightful lunch. In the afternoon, experience a unique basket boat ride at Bay Mau Palm Garden, followed by an exploration of Hoi An Ancient Town, a historic international trading port from the 16th century. Discover iconic sites like the Japanese Covered Bridge, Fujian Assembly Hall, Tan Ky Old House, and Hoi An Central Market. Enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Hoi An before returning to your hotel in Da Nang for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":246,"a_name":"Da Nang Arrival + Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town ","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Da Nang","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. At 08:30 AM, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you'll enjoy breathtaking views from the cable car as you ascend to the summit. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, then continue to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden with a variety of blooms. Take another cable car route to the French Village, situated at 1,138 meters, and admire its unique architectural charm. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and a 4D movie experience are included in your tour package (some games with rewards may require an extra fee). After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the base and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up and transfer you to your hotel for check-in.

Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden showcasing a variety of colorful blooms. Continue your journey by taking another cable car to the French Village, located at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its charming European-style architecture. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and 4D movie experiences are included in the tour package (some prize-winning games may require an additional fee). After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

08:30 AM: After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will meet you in the lobby and accompany you on a one-and-a-half-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels. This intricate 200km-long tunnel network served as a vital shelter for guerrillas during the war against American troops and stands as a remarkable testament to human resilience and ingenuity. Explore this historical site and gain insights into Vietnam’s wartime past before returning to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy your free time until the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver pick you up and transfer you to the airport for your departure flight home, concluding your memorable journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Ho Chi Minh","to":"Ho Chi Minh Airport","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":244,"a_name":"Cu Chi Tunnel Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Ho Chi Minh","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":"[\"null\"]","a_details":"

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview: Picture dawn’s first light casting a golden glow over Ha Long Bay’s towering karsts as you drift through mist-kissed waters with Travelxploria, the air alive with birdsong and whispered legends of ancient mariners. By midday, you’re trekking along Sapa’s emerald terraces—each step revealing a new vista of sculpted rice paddies and hillside villages where time-honored traditions still shape every basket and loom under Travelxploria’s expert guidance. As the sun dips low, Da Nang’s white-sand beaches beckon—you sink your toes into warm, powdery shores before savoring a bowl of fragrant pho at a beachside stall, its steam rising like a promise of tomorrow’s adventures curated by Travelxploria. In Hanoi’s winding alleys, the clatter of motorbikes fades into the aroma of fresh herbs and sizzling banh mi, while in Ho Chi Minh City, neon lights dance off colonial facades, inviting you into night markets pulsing with life. Everywhere you wander, ancient pagodas stand sentinel over modern boulevards, and warm smiles remind you that Vietnam’s true luxury is its people. This is a land where history breathes in every stone and nature dazzles at every turn—Travelxploria’s invitation to have your story waiting to be written.

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on an enriching journey through Hanoi with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. 8:30 AM: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and take you to the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ho Chi Minh’s Mausoleum, the final resting place of the beloved national hero, Uncle Ho. Explore President Ho Chi Minh’s stilt house, where he lived intermittently from 1958 to 1969, and gain insights into his life at the Ho Chi Minh Museum. 9:30 AM: Next, visit the iconic One Pillar Pagoda, an architectural marvel built over water in the middle of a square lake. Then, journey to the serene Tran Quoc Pagoda, beautifully situated on the shores of West Lake. Continue to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first university, dedicated to Confucius and a symbol of the nation’s scholarly heritage. Later, visit the tranquil Hoan Kiem Lake, often referred to as the heart and soul of Hanoi, before heading to the Museum of Ethnology. Here, you will explore Vietnam’s rich cultural diversity through an extensive collection of 15,000 artifacts, detailed dioramas, and interactive displays. Our experienced guide will provide fascinating insights into ethnic traditions, the making of traditional conical hats, and the customs of indigenous tribes. Don’t miss the opportunity to visit a reconstructed Black Thai house and witness the meticulous research conducted by scientists worldwide on traditional Vietnamese cultures. This immersive tour, led by Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensures a deep understanding of Hanoi’s history, culture, and heritage.

In the morning, embark on a half-day city tour accompanied by a Representative of Travelxploria. Your first stop will be the Ho Chi Minh Complex, which includes Ba Dinh Square, the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays; however, you can still view the building from the outside), a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (view from outside), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the famous One Pillar Pagoda. Next, visit the Temple of Literature, where Confucius, the founder of Confucianism, is worshiped. This historic site also served as Vietnam’s first National University, where many kings, mandarins, and scholars were trained. In the afternoon, enjoy a 3.5-hour scenic drive to Halong Bay, passing through the picturesque Red River Delta countryside with a short break along the way.

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a boat tour to Luon Cave, a breathtaking ring-shaped pool nestled within an island in Halong Bay, where you will be surrounded by an absolutely tranquil landscape and emerald waters. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will enrich your journey with fascinating insights into the area’s natural wonders. Cruise back to Halong Wharf, passing through the most densely clustered islands, including the famous Cock-Fighting Rock, Sail Island, Incense Burner Rock, and Sea Dog Rock, each uniquely shaped by nature’s artistry. Arrive at Halong Wharf around 11:00 AM, then begin your scenic return journey to Hanoi, reaching the city around 4:00 PM. Upon arrival, our private driver, accompanied by Travelxploria’s experienced guide, will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Once you land in Ho Chi Minh, you will be warmly welcomed by our representative, who will ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel, allowing you to settle in and relax.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrival at Bagdogra Airport and transfer to Phuentsholing with scenic views of tea gardens.​
  • Immigration formalities and drive to Thimphu with en route photo stops and local sightseeing.​
  • Excursion to Punakha with visits to Dochula Pass, Suspension Bridge, Chimi Lhakhang & Punakha Dzong.​
  • Thimphu local sightseeing including Memorial Chorten, Buddha Dordenma, and Changangkha Lhakhang; drive to Paro.​
  • Hike to the iconic Tiger’s Nest Monastery (Paro Taktsang).
  • Paro sightseeing covering Simtokha Dzong, National Museum, Rinpung Dzong, Drukgyal Dzong, and Kyichu Lhakhang; return to Phuentsholing.
  • Departure from Phuentsholing to Bagdogra Airport with fond memories of Bhutan.​

After breakfast, complete the immigration formalities and proceed to Thimphu, the capital of Bhutan, via Gedu, located about 9,000 feet above sea level, with a scenic view of Chukha Dam. En route, enjoy a photo stop at Wankha Waterfalls. Upon arrival in Thimphu, check in to the hotel and explore the local market in the evening. Visit the Tashichho Dzong, a historic monastery by the Wang Chhu River, also known as Thimphu Dzong, which hosts the annual three-day Tsechu festival and dates back to 1216 A.D. In the evening, stroll around Clock Tower Square, a popular architectural landmark with four clock faces, surrounded by restaurants and souvenir shops. Overnight stay at a hotel in Thimphu.

After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, begin your scenic drive to Punakha. En route, stop at the stunning Dochula Pass, located at an altitude of 3,150 meters, to take in panoramic Himalayan views and visit the iconic 108 Druk Wangyel Chortens. Continue onward to explore the majestic Punakha Dzong, a masterpiece of Bhutanese architecture nestled between two rivers. Take a walk across Bhutan’s longest suspension bridge, offering breathtaking valley views, followed by a short hike to Chimi Lhakhang, also known as the Temple of Fertility. Later, drive back to Thimphu where you can enjoy a leisurely evening exploring the town. Overnight stay will be in Thimphu.

The National Memorial Chorten in Thimphu was built in memory of the third Druk Gyalpo (King) of Bhutan and is dedicated to world peace. It is a revered site for locals and hosts several major Buddhist religious festivals, making it one of the most significant places to visit in Thimphu.

The Buddha Dordenma Statue, perched on a hilltop, is an iconic landmark in Thimphu. This grand golden statue of Buddha sits above a large meditation hall and houses 125,000 smaller Buddha statues inside, making it home to more Buddhas than the population of the city itself. It is commonly referred to as Buddha Point.

Another must-visit site is Changangkha Lhakhang, one of the oldest temples in Thimphu, dating back to the 12th century. Known as the \"wish-fulfilling temple,\" it holds deep religious significance. The temple also offers a stunning panoramic view of Thimphu city.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Thimphu\"]","inserted_id":"[731]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Paro/Thimphu local sightseeing/1745915470405-Thimphu local sightseeing 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Paro/Thimphu local sightseeing/1745915470572-Thimphu local sightseeing.jfif\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Paro/Thimphu local sightseeing/1745915470574-Thimphu local sightseeing 1.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Paro tiger nest hiking","day_summary":"

Paro Taktsang, also known as the Tiger’s Nest Monastery, is one of the most sacred Vajrayana Buddhist sites in the Himalayas, dramatically perched on a cliffside in the upper Paro Valley of Bhutan. It is one of the thirteen legendary “Tiger’s Nest” caves across historical Tibet where Guru Padmasambhava is believed to have meditated and taught Vajrayana Buddhism.

The present-day monastery complex was constructed in 1692 around the Taktsang Senge Samdup cave, where Guru Padmasambhava, along with his disciples including Yeshe Tsogyal, engaged in deep spiritual practice before leaving Tibet in the early 9th century. Revered as the founder of Vajrayana Buddhism in Bhutan, Padmasambhava is also regarded as the country's spiritual protector.

Today, Paro Taktsang stands as the most iconic of these sacred caves, drawing pilgrims and travelers alike. After visiting this revered site, enjoy an overnight stay at your hotel in Paro.

Simtokha Dzong: Built in 1629 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal, Simtokha Dzong is one of the oldest dzongs in Bhutan. Also known as Sangak Zabdhon Phodrang, it holds great historical and religious significance. Constructed in the 17th century, this ancient fortress is a remarkable example of Bhutanese architecture and remains an important cultural landmark.

National Museum of Bhutan: Once an ancient watchtower, this museum now houses an extensive collection of Bhutanese artifacts. From traditional costumes and armor to weapons and daily life tools, the museum reflects the rich heritage and artistic traditions of Bhutan.

Ta Dzong: Originally built in 1649 as a watchtower to defend the Rinpung Dzong during times of war, Ta Dzong was later converted into Bhutan’s National Museum in 1968. It now serves as a cultural treasure trove, offering insights into the country’s past.

Rinpung Dzong: Also known as Paro Dzong, this majestic fortress was constructed in 1644 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal. It is an excellent example of traditional Bhutanese architecture and is one of Paro’s top tourist attractions.

Drukgyal Dzong: Known as the “Victorious Fortress,” Drukgyal Dzong is a historic Buddhist monastery and fortress. It commemorates Bhutan’s victory over Tibetan invaders and is considered one of the most beautiful archaeological sites in the country.

Paro Airport Viewpoint: Paro International Airport, Bhutan’s only international airport, is famous for its scenic beauty. Surrounded by dramatic mountains and lush valleys, it is considered one of the most stunning airports in the world and a must-visit spot for travelers in Paro.

Kyichu Lhakhang: Also called Kyerchu Lhakhang, this sacred temple is one of the oldest and most revered pilgrimage sites in Bhutan. It is part of a network of 108 temples built by a Tibetan king and is a cherished spiritual destination known for its serene beauty.

Kyichu Lhakhang: Also called Kyerchu Lhakhang, this sacred temple is one of the oldest and most revered pilgrimage sites in Bhutan. It is part of a network of 108 temples built by a Tibetan king and is a cherished spiritual destination known for its serene beauty.

packages.overview:
• Arrive at Hasimara, drive to Phuentsholing, complete permit formalities, and continue to Thimphu.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Thimphu, including Buddha Dordenma, National Memorial Chorten, Folk Heritage Museum, and Motithang Takin Preserve.
  • ​Drive to Phobjikha, visit Dochula Pass, Gangtey Monastery, Phobjikha Valley, and Black-Necked Crane Information Centre.
  • Drive to Bumthang via Trongsa, visit Pele La Pass, Chendebji Chorten, and Trongsa Dzong.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Bumthang, including Jakar Dzong, Kurje Lhakhang, Tamshing Lhakhang, Jambay Lhakhang, Mebar Tsho, Swiss Farm, and Red Panda Brewery.
  • Drive back to Punakha, passing through Trongsa and Pele La Pass.
  • Explore Punakha, including Punakha Dzong, Suspension Bridge, and Chimi Lhakhang, then drive to Paro.
  • Hike to Tiger's Nest Monastery, enjoy a hot stone bath, and relax in Paro.​
  • Explore Paro, visit the National Museum, and depart for Hasimara.​

It's a peaceful spot to begin your Bhutan journey. Afterward, check into your hotel, relax, and prepare for the upcoming journey.

After breakfast, embark on a full day of sightseeing in Thimphu, beginning with a visit to Buddha Dordenma, a massive statue overlooking the city and offering stunning panoramic views. Next, explore the National Memorial Chorten, a revered stupa built in honor of the third king where locals gather to pray and spin prayer wheels. Continue to the Folk Heritage Museum, which showcases traditional Bhutanese rural life through exhibits of farming tools, household objects, and a replica of a traditional farmhouse. In the afternoon, visit the Motithang Takin Preserve, home to Bhutan’s unique national animal, the takin. Then head to Changangkha Lhakhang, a popular temple where locals seek blessings for newborns, and conclude the day with a stroll around the iconic Clock Tower. Overnight stay will be in Thimphu.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Phobjikha","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Thimphu to Phobjikha sightseeing & Stay Phobjikha.","day_summary":"

After breakfast, drive to the serene Phobjikha Valley with your first stop at Dochula Pass, located at an altitude of 3,100 meters and offering breathtaking views just 35 minutes from Thimphu. En route, visit the renowned Gangtey Monastery (Gangtey Goenpa), one of the oldest and most significant Nyingma monasteries in Bhutan, which overlooks the Phobjikha Valley and provides a tranquil atmosphere to explore traditional architecture and observe monks in prayer. Upon arrival in Phobjikha, enjoy the beauty of the glacial valley, known for its scenic landscapes, rich wildlife, and as a winter home for the endangered black-necked cranes migrating from Tibet between October and February. Conclude the day with a visit to the Black-Necked Crane Information Centre, which offers educational exhibits and spotting scopes to view the cranes during migration season, enhancing your understanding of the valley’s ecological importance. Overnight stay will be in Phobjikha.

Early in the morning, after breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Bumthang via Trongsa, one of the most culturally rich and picturesque routes in Bhutan, typically taking 7 to 9 hours depending on stops and road conditions. Along the way, enjoy several key attractions including Pele La Pass at 3,420 meters, which separates western and central Bhutan and offers views of distant snow-capped peaks adorned with fluttering prayer flags. Stop at Chendebji Chorten, a serene Buddhist stupa modeled after Kathmandu’s Swayambhunath, perfect for a peaceful rest. Continue to Trongsa, where you’ll visit the majestic Trongsa Dzong, the largest fortress in Bhutan, historically significant and offering stunning views over the Mangde River. This route offers a captivating mix of culture, heritage, and natural beauty, culminating in an overnight stay at Bumthang.

Bumthang/1745929432159-Amankora, Bumthang.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Bumthang Sightseeing full day.","day_summary":"

After a healthy breakfast, begin a full day of sightseeing in Bumthang, the spiritual heartland of Bhutan, rich in history and culture. Start with a visit to Jakar Dzong, also known as the \"Castle of the White Bird,\" which offers panoramic views of the Bumthang Valley and serves as the administrative center of the region. Continue to Kurje Lhakhang, one of Bhutan’s most sacred monasteries where Guru Rinpoche meditated, followed by Tamshing Lhakhang, renowned for its ancient wall paintings and religious importance. Visit Jambay Lhakhang, a 7th-century temple built by Tibetan King Songtsen Gampo, making it one of the oldest and most significant temples in the country. Explore Mebar Tsho, or the Burning Lake, a revered holy site where Terton Pema Lingpa discovered hidden treasures. Conclude the day with a visit to the Swiss Farm to witness local cheese and cider production, and then enjoy a tasting at the Red Panda Brewery, Bhutan’s first brewery. Return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Punakha","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Bumthang to Punakha Night stay","day_summary":"

Early in the morning, after a healthy breakfast, begin the long drive back to Punakha, which takes approximately 7 to 9 hours. The journey passes through Trongsa and crosses the scenic Pele La Pass, a high-altitude route that marks the division between central and western Bhutan. Continuing the drive through Wangdue Phodrang without any sightseeing stops, you will reach Punakha by late afternoon or early evening, depending on road conditions and travel pace. Upon arrival, check into the hotel, relax, and prepare for the journey ahead, followed by an overnight stay in Punakha.

Local and Night Stay at Paro","day_summary":"

After breakfast, begin your exploration of Punakha with a visit to the majestic Punakha Dzong (Pungtang Dechen Phodrang Dzong), renowned for its stunning architecture, rich historical significance, and scenic location at the confluence of two rivers. Continue to the Punakha Suspension Bridge, one of the longest in Bhutan, offering a thrilling experience and breathtaking views of the Punakha Valley. Next, visit Chimi Lhakhang, also known as the Fertility Temple, dedicated to the Divine Madman and famed for its unique blessings and legends. In the afternoon, drive to Paro, check in to the hotel, relax, and prepare for the journey ahead, with an overnight stay in Paro.

Paro Taktsang, also known as the Tiger’s Nest Monastery, is one of the most sacred Vajrayana Buddhist sites in the Himalayas, dramatically perched on a cliffside in the upper Paro Valley of Bhutan. It is one of the thirteen legendary “Tiger’s Nest” caves across historical Tibet where Guru Padmasambhava is believed to have meditated and taught Vajrayana Buddhism.

The present-day monastery complex was constructed in 1692 around the Taktsang Senge Samdup cave, where Guru Padmasambhava, along with his disciples including Yeshe Tsogyal, engaged in deep spiritual practice before leaving Tibet in the early 9th century. Revered as the founder of Vajrayana Buddhism in Bhutan, Padmasambhava is also regarded as the country's spiritual protector.

Today, Paro Taktsang stands as the most iconic of these sacred caves, drawing pilgrims and travelers alike. After visiting this revered site, enjoy an overnight stay at your hotel in Paro.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrival at Bagdogra Airport, transfer to Phuentsholing (5 hrs), check-in, and free time for the local market.
  • Drive from Phuentsholing to Thimphu (6 hrs), immigration formalities, and evening free for the local market.
  • Explore Thimphu, visiting the National Memorial Chorten, Buddha Dordenma Statue, Changangkha Lhakhang, Motithang Takin Preserve, National Library, Painting School, Bhutan Textile Museum, Clock Tower, and Tashi Chho Dzong.
  • ​Drive from Thimphu to Paro via Dochula Pass and Punakha, visiting Punakha Dzong and Punakha Suspension Bridge.
  • Local sightseeing in Paro, visiting Simtokha Dzong, National Museum, Ta Dzong, Rinpung Dzong, Drukgyal Dzong, Paro Airport View, and Kyichu Lhakhang.
  • Drive from Paro to Phuentsholing (6 hrs), evening free for the local market.
  • Departure from Phuentsholing, transfer to NJP Station/Bagdogra Airport, cherishing Bhutan Holiday Tour memories.​

Overnight stay at the hotel in Thimphu.

In Thimphu, you can explore several significant landmarks, starting with the National Memorial Chorten, built in memory of the third Druk Gyalpo and dedicated to World Peace, a popular site for Buddhist religious festivals. The Buddha Dordenma Statue, located atop a hill, is a massive golden Buddha with 125,000 smaller Buddha statues inside, making it an iconic spot in the city. Changangkha Lhakhang, a 12th-century temple known as the \"wish-fulfilling\" temple, offers a stunning view of Thimphu. The Motithang Takin Preserve, home to Bhutan's national animal, the Takin, is a great destination for animal lovers. The National Library, established in 1967, houses a valuable collection of historic manuscripts, photos, and books. The Painting School, or Institute for Zorig Chusum, is where students learn traditional art forms, while the Bhutan Textile Museum showcases the country’s rich textile heritage. The Clock Tower, a unique architectural marvel with four clock faces, is a popular site, especially in the evening when visitors can enjoy the nearby restaurants and souvenir shops. Finally, Tashi Chho Dzong, a monastery on the banks of the Wang Chhu River, hosts the annual three-day Tsechu festival and dates back to 1216 AD. Overnight stay at the hotel in Thimphu.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paro","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618052142-AdobeStock_65598899.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618052760-AdobeStock_137774984.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618052855-AdobeStock_294984667.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618053002-AdobeStock_526226645.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618053279-AdobeStock_699351803.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618053406-AdobeStock_1070936357.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Thimpu – Punakha sightseeing to Paro","day_summary":"

Dochula Pass, located between Thimphu and Punakha at an elevation of around 3100 meters, offers a stunning view of the Eastern Himalayas and is home to 108 stupas. In winter, the pass is covered in snow, making it a particularly beautiful destination. Punakha Dzong, regarded as one of Bhutan's most beautiful architectural wonders, is situated at the confluence of the Pho Chu and Mo Chu rivers. It is a sacred site with deep historical significance and is especially suitable for first-timers, children, and elderly visitors. The Punakha Suspension Bridge, one of the oldest of its kind in the world, was built by the Buddhist monk Thangtong Gyalpo and is adorned with prayer flags. The bridge offers a picturesque spot for bird watching and nature photography. Overnight stay at the hotel in Paro.

Simtokha Dzong: Built in 1629 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal, Simtokha Dzong is one of the oldest dzongs in Bhutan. Also known asSangak Zabdhon Phodrang, it holds great historical and religious significance. Constructed in the 17th century, this ancient fortress is a remarkable example of Bhutanese architecture and remains an important cultural landmark.

National Museum of Bhutan: Once an ancient watchtower, this museum now houses an extensive collection of Bhutanese artifacts. From traditional costumes and armor to weapons and daily life tools, the museum reflects the rich heritage and artistic traditions of Bhutan.

Ta Dzong: Originally built in 1649 as a watchtower to defend the Rinpung Dzong during times of war, Ta Dzong was later converted into Bhutan’s National Museum in 1968. It now serves as a cultural treasure trove, offering insights into the country’s past.

Rinpung Dzong: Also known as Paro Dzong, this majestic fortress was constructed in 1644 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal. It is an excellent example of traditional Bhutanese architecture and is one of Paro’s top tourist attractions.

Drukgyal Dzong: Known as the “Victorious Fortress,” Drukgyal Dzong is a historic Buddhist monastery and fortress. It commemorates Bhutan’s victory over Tibetan invaders and is considered one of the most beautiful archaeological sites in the country.

Paro Airport Viewpoint: Paro International Airport, Bhutan’s only international airport, is famous for its scenic beauty. Surrounded by dramatic mountains and lush valleys, it is considered one of the most stunning airports in the world and a must-visit spot for travelers in Paro.

Kyichu Lhakhang: Also called Kyerchu Lhakhang, this sacred temple is one of the oldest and most revered pilgrimage sites in Bhutan. It is part of a network of 108 temples built by a Tibetan king and is a cherished spiritual destination known for its serene beauty.

packages.overview:
• Arrival at Kathmandu International Airport with hotel transfer and welcome soft drink; leisure time and overnight stay in Kathmandu.
  • Breakfast followed by full-day Kathmandu sightseeing: Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath Stupa, and Kathmandu Durbar Square; leisure time and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, drive to Pokhara via Manakamana Temple; welcome soft drink, leisure time, and overnight stay in Pokhara.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Pokhara covering Bindabashini Temple, Gupteshor Cave, Devi’s Fall, Seti River, Fewa Lake, and Peace Pagoda; leisure time and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, drive to Chitwan; welcome drink, lunch, village tour, Tharu culture dance, leisure time, dinner, and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, bird watching, elephant safari, jungle walk, canoeing; meals and overnight stay in Chitwan.
  • Breakfast, drive back to Kathmandu; welcome drink, leisure time, and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast and transfer from hotel to Kathmandu International Airport for departure.

Upon arrival at Kathmandu International Airport, our friendly TravelXploria representative will warmly welcome you and assist with your transfer to the hotel. Enjoy a refreshing welcome soft drink upon check-in, then relax and unwind during your free leisure time. Spend a comfortable overnight stay at your hotel in Kathmandu, beginning your unforgettable Nepal journey with ease and comfort.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Kathmandu International Airport","to":"Kathmandu","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":1582,"h_name":"Hotel Manang","h_country":"Nepal","h_city":"Kathmandu","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/Hotel Manang/1747377071497-Hotel Manang.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/Hotel Manang/1747377071579-Hotel Manang1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/Hotel Manang/1747377071658-Hotel Manang 2.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":1587,"h_name":"Grand Hotel","h_country":"Nepal","h_city":"Kathmandu","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/Grand Hotel/1747378253058-Grand Hotel Kathmandu.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/Grand Hotel/1747378253183-Grand Hotel kathmandu 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/Grand Hotel/1747378253192-Grand Hotel kath.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1596,"h_name":"The Everest Hotel","h_country":"Nepal","h_city":"Kathmandu","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/The Everest Hotel/1747381228155-The Everest Hotel.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/The Everest Hotel/1747381228225-The Everest Hotel1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kathmandu/The Everest Hotel/1747381228262-The Everest Hotel2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Kathmandu Sightseeing","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel before embarking on a full-day sightseeing tour of Kathmandu’s most iconic landmarks. Visit the sacred Pashupatinath Temple, one of the holiest Hindu sites, followed by a trip to the magnificent Boudhanath Stupa, a revered center of Buddhist worship. Next, explore the famous Swayambhunath Stupa, also known as the Monkey Temple, which offers stunning panoramic views of the city. Conclude your cultural journey at the historic Kathmandu Durbar Square, rich with ancient architecture and heritage. After the tour, enjoy free time to relax or explore at your leisure. Overnight stay at the hotel in Kathmandu.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Pokhara","country":"Nepal","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041086666-AdobeStock_311461036-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041087540-AdobeStock_341652665-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041087662-AdobeStock_366915671-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041087746-AdobeStock_545470493-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer from Kathmandu to Pokhara","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast at the hotel before departing Kathmandu for Pokhara. En route, visit the sacred Manakamana Temple, accessible by a scenic cable car ride, where you can seek blessings and admire the stunning surroundings. After the temple visit, continue your journey to Pokhara, a picturesque city nestled beside serene lakes and majestic mountains, covering approximately 210 kilometers in 7 to 8 hours. Upon arrival, our TravelXploria representative will welcome you with a refreshing soft drink at your hotel. The rest of the day is yours to relax and enjoy at your leisure. Overnight stay in Pokhara.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel before embarking on a full-day sightseeing tour of Pokhara. Visit the revered Bindabashini Temple, an important religious site dedicated to the goddess Durga. Explore the mysterious Gupteshor Cave, followed by the breathtaking Devi’s Fall, where water cascades dramatically into a deep gorge. Continue to the serene Seti River and take in the tranquil beauty of Fewa Lake, perfect for relaxation and boating. End your tour at the Peace Pagoda, offering panoramic views of Pokhara and the surrounding Himalayan peaks. Enjoy leisure time afterward. Overnight stay at the hotel in Pokhara.

packages.overview:
•  Arrival in Kathmandu with airport pickup by Travelxploria representative, hotel transfer, welcome drink, and leisure time.
  • Explore Kathmandu’s spiritual landmarks including Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, and Swayambhunath Stupa, then drive to Nagarkot via Bhaktapur Durbar Square for sunset and Himalayan views.
  •  Witness sunrise over the Himalayas in Nagarkot, followed by a scenic drive to Pokhara with hotel check-in and leisure time.
  • Enjoy full-day Pokhara sightseeing covering Bindabashini Temple, Gupteshor Cave, Devi’s Fall, Seti River, Fewa Lake, and Peace Pagoda.
  • Drive back to Kathmandu with en route Manakamana Temple darshan by cable car, followed by hotel check-in and relaxation.
  • Departure from Kathmandu with airport drop after breakfast.

Enjoy a scenic cable car ride to reach the temple, offering spectacular views of the surrounding hills and valleys. After the darshan, continue your drive to Kathmandu, covering a distance of approximately 210 km in 7–8 hours. Upon arrival, check in at the hotel and enjoy a refreshing welcome drink. The rest of the day is free for leisure. Overnight stay at your hotel in Kathmandu.

packages.package_name: Sheraton Maldives Full Moon Resort & Spa
packages.overview:
• Featuring effortless elegance in relaxing spaces, our Maldives family suites serve as your idyllic sanctuary after an adventure-filled day on the island. The resort offers a wide range of rooms, from understated deluxe rooms to charming cottages, boastful ocean pool villas, and indulging water villas.
  • Relax in our exquisite 74 sqm Water Villa with Pool, perfect for a serene retreat. This one-bedroom haven features premium amenities, a spacious day bed, private dining area, kitchen, and a beautifully designed bathroom. Enjoy classic decor and a stunning 180-degree view of the Indian Ocean, making it an ideal setting for an unforgettable escape.

Awake to breathtaking views of the turquoise lagoon and enjoy a hearty breakfast by the water. Dive into an exciting day of water sports—snorkeling at the resort’s house reef, a guided paddleboarding tour, or a diving excursion (optional) to explore nearby coral gardens. After lunch, head to Shine Spa for a rejuvenating massage or signature treatment in an overwater spa villa. Wind down your day with sunset cocktails at Anchorage Bar followed by dinner at Feast, featuring international cuisine and live cooking stations.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Custom Adventures or Pure Relaxation","day_summary":"

This day is completely yours—wake up at your own pace and choose how you’d like to spend your time. If you're up for something unique, enjoy a private floating breakfast in your villa pool or reserve a couple’s spa ritual. Capture one last magical Maldivian sunset and celebrate your final evening with a candlelit dinner by the ocean.

packages.overview:
• Some places are best experienced; where your eyes chase the endless expanse of the ocean while the soft sand caresses your feet and the crisp air fills your lungs with life. Where time moves lazily as sunshine sparkles on the turquoise waters and swaying palm trees serenade your senses. Welcome to such a slice of tropical luxury, nestled in the stunning yet sparsely populated Lhaviyani Atoll. A short seaplane ride from Male International Airport, our all-inclusive resort in the Maldives features luxurious villas amidst lush vegetation and the alluring Indian Ocean. The interiors feature contemporary Maldivian accents, overlooking crystal-clear waters underneath which a magical world of coral reefs awaits exploration. This is a tropical experience that is as unique as it is luxurious and one that will make you come back in a heartbeat.
  • Much like the diversity of our palm-fringed island, our dining experiences are teeming with unique culinary choices. From homely Sri Lankan cuisine to tantalising global flavours, from contemporary vegetarian delights to authentic Japanese teppanyaki, our chefs are delighted to plate for every discerning palate. We’re here to serve gastronomical experiences that make your heart full and appetite satiated but leave your taste buds longing for more.

packages.overview:
• Sleek and spacious accommodations make Sun Siyam Iru Veli the ultimate tropical retreat. With front row lagoon views and a freshwater pool for every five star suite, all you have to do is check in, chill out and let our neighbouring dolphins provide your entertainment as they swim past each day.
  • From the moment you arrive, shoes are left at the door, so forget dress codes and come as you are. Here we live the barefoot idyll, so sit back and sink your toes into the softest white sand – it doesn’t get better than this.
  • Priding ourselves on innovation, our main restaurant has a daily-changing menu to mix up seasonal flavours, and we serve plenty of the ocean’s bounty with the best seafood you’ll ever taste. You can even watch exotic fish pass under the glass floor below as you sink into a relaxing massage. It’s time to discover the true meaning of rest and rejuvenation here on our sapphire waters.

Upon arrival at Velana International Airport in Malé, you’ll be whisked away on a scenic 40-minute seaplane flight to the stunning island of Sun Siyam Iru Veli. After a warm Maldivian welcome, check into your spacious Beach Villa with a private pool, steps away from powder-soft sands and turquoise waters. Spend your afternoon soaking up the sun, dipping into your pool, or enjoying the tranquil beach. In the evening, enjoy a gourmet dinner at Aqua Orange, the resort’s all-day dining venue offering global cuisine in a beautiful lagoon-front setting.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Ferry","from":"Male Velena International Airport","to":"Male","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"5":[{"h_id":1385,"h_name":"Sun Siyam Iru Veli","h_country":"Maldives","h_city":"Male","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922654-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 5.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922686-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 4.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922758-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922801-Sun Siyam Iru Veli.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922805-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922829-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Water Sports, Wellness & Sunset Views","day_summary":"

For diving enthusiasts, consider booking an optional scuba excursion to the nearby coral reefs. In the afternoon, indulge in a luxurious treatment at Sun Siyam Spa, with its serene overwater pavilions and holistic therapies. Wrap up your day with sunset cocktails at Chemistry Bar followed by dinner at Grouper Grill, where fresh seafood is the star.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Adventure or Pure Relaxation – You Choose","day_summary":"

Enjoy your morning at leisure—opt for a sunrise beach walk, private yoga session, or simply lounge by your villa’s pool. After breakfast, embark on an optional dolphin-spotting cruise or sandbank picnic for a picture-perfect afternoon. If you prefer to stay on the island, relax at the infinity pool or join a wine-tasting session hosted by the resort’s sommelier. End your final night with a romantic private dining experience on the beach, under a blanket of stars.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure – Last Moments in Paradise","day_summary":"

Savor your final island breakfast and take in the peaceful atmosphere one last time. Enjoy a swim or short beach stroll before check-out. You’ll then board your return seaplane to Malé, carrying with you the serene memories of your 3-night beach villa escape at Sun Siyam Iru Veli.

packages.overview:
• ​Experience pristine views of golden shores and turquoise waters at Adaaran Select Hudhuran Fushi, a Maldives Beach Resort with modern amenities and a vibrant ambiance. The Premium All Inclusive resort offers accommodation for surfers, honeymooners, and families and includes free excursions for stays over five nights, along with daily snorkeling tours. Dive in to see what room category suits you best, to experience the best of the Maldives.
  • ​Adaaran Select Huduranfushi boasts a multi faceted dining experience at its Maldives Hotel Restaurants with spectacular views accompanying almost every meal. Start the day with a breakfast buffet and enjoy ethnic dishes, international cuisine or light snacks in a variety of restaurants and cafes. Choose from a range of fresh sea food and create a meal to your liking while you enjoy the ever changing views of the Indian Ocean.
  • Indulge in a candle lit dinner or celebrate and sip a glass of wine and relax to the soothing sounds of the ocean at the Sunset Bar and Restaurant, the resort’s signature cafe. Themed buffet style meals at our distinctive Maldives Hotel restaurants offer a combination of Maldivian and international cuisines to tempt discerning tastes nightly.

packages.overview:
• Embrace the magical Indian Ocean experience from a vibrant beach or overwater villa, offering stunning ocean views. Refreshingly friendly, caring service and playfully designed spaces create a fun, free-spirited stay.
  • A fun, chilled-out balance is at the heart of the dining experience at the limited-service all day dining restaurant, Element X. Share memorable family moments over flavoursome feasts and convenient self-service beverage counters. Immerse in a multi-layered experience at the lively X360 bar – with a uniquely interactive, fun, and exuberant ambience.
  • OBLU XPERIENCE Ailafushi is a Green Globe certified resort. Sensitive handling of island ecosystems, sustainable drinking water solutions, supporting local communities, and other green initiatives are the norm here.

packages.overview:
• The Maldives is a tropical island nation located in the Indian Ocean, southwest of Sri Lanka and India. Comprising 26 atolls and over 1,000 coral islands, the Maldives is renowned for its crystal-clear turquoise waters, powdery white-sand beaches, luxurious overwater villas, and vibrant coral reefs. It is one of the world’s most sought-after honeymoon and luxury travel destinations.

  • The Maldives pioneered the concept of luxurious water villas with direct lagoon access.

  • Home to some of the most diverse and vibrant marine ecosystems, ideal for diving and snorkeling.

packages.overview:
• Our villas and suites draw inspiration from our sun-drenched isle, with its idyllic pearl-white beaches and lush tropical greenery. Savour the raw natural beauty that comes with desert island life, with the glittering lights of Malé twinkling in the distance. Your dream holiday in the Maldives begins right here.
  • Our six superb restaurants showcase global cuisines, including authentic Japanese- and Italian-inspired dining. Our Maldivian dishes are fragrant with traditional spices and we enjoy an abundance of seafood caught by local fishermen in the waters that surround the island. Fresh produce is handpicked daily by chefs from our organic gardens or markets in Malé.
  • A voyage of the senses starts at Araamu Spa, a tropical garden sanctuary where time doesn’t move from hour to hour but mood to moment. Surrounded by the lush greenery of a private spa pavilion, find your zen while the restorative power of the island and sounds of exotic birds allow you to fully experience physical, mental and spiritual rejuvenation.

packages.overview:
• The island of Mauritius was uninhabited before its first recorded visit by Arab sailors in the end of the 10th century. Its name Dina Arobi has been associated with Arab sailors who first discovered the island.
  • Mauritius Island is relatively young geologically, having been created by volcanic activity some 8 million years ago. Together with Saint Brandon, Réunion, and Rodrigues, the island is part of the Mascarene Islands.
  • Lagoon Attitude has also an idyllic location for windsurfing and kitesurfing in Mauritius. Its typical Mauritian architecture and natural decoration offer a peaceful Mauritian stay.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Mauritius","country":"Mauritius","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981460-AdobeStock_128667384.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981715-AdobeStock_164381882 (1).jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982299-AdobeStock_166065656.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982492-AdobeStock_236139821.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Mauritius: Arrival","day_summary":"

Upon your arrival at Mauritius airport, you will be warmly welcomed by a Travelxploria representative. From there, you will be comfortably escorted to your resort in a private vehicle.

After checking in at the resort, take some time to refresh and unwind. If time permits, feel free to explore the nearby surroundings at your own pace or simply relax and soak in the peaceful ambiance of the island.

As evening sets in, enjoy a delicious dinner served at the resort, savoring the delightful flavors with your family. Later, retreat to the comfort of your cozy bed for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Mauritius Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Airport","to":"Mauritius","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1404,"h_name":"Lagoon Attitude Hotel","h_country":"Mauritius","h_city":"Mauritius","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Lagoon Attitude Hotel/1745997420353-Lagoon Attitude Hotel 4.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Lagoon Attitude Hotel/1745997420475-Lagoon Attitude Hotel 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Lagoon Attitude Hotel/1745997420595-Lagoon Attitude Hotel.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Lagoon Attitude Hotel/1745997420712-Lagoon Attitude Hotel 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Lagoon Attitude Hotel/1745997420824-Lagoon Attitude Hotel 2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day South Island Tour","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.overview:
• Located on the south coast of Mauritius in the nature reserve of Bel Ombre
  • Classic plantation-style architecture showcasing the island's heritage for an immersive travel experience
  • Various guest activities connecting guests to Mauritian culture, including Sega music & dancing, cooking classes, rum tasting and more
  • Partnered with Reef Conservation in their inclusive and holistic conservation initiatives for the wider Bel Ombre and South West Coast communities

Once you’ve checked in, take some time to relax and rejuvenate after your journey. If time allows, you can step out to explore the nearby surroundings or simply unwind and soak in the serene beauty of the island.

As the evening unfolds, delight in a sumptuous dinner served at the resort, enjoying quality time with your family. Later, head back to your cozy room for a peaceful night’s sleep, preparing for the adventures that lie ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

packages.package_name: Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa
packages.overview:
• Located on an island in the Indian Ocean, the Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius is an adult-only resort offering a serene tropical getaway on Mauritius's eastern shores. Experience stunning ocean views, beach activities, and nearby attractions like Grand Bay and Flacq Market. Our 4-star resort features comfortable rooms with modern amenities, including two on-site restaurants, a spa, a pool, and a stylish conference room with picturesque views, ideal for intimate meetings of up to 16 attendees.
  • Experience comfort at Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius, an exclusive adults-only haven. Delight in a unique culinary adventure at one of our onsite dining options, rejuvenate your senses at our serene on-site spa, and stay active at our state-of-the-art fitness center.
  • Bask in the sun by our pristine pool, or explore the stunning surroundings with our convenient bike rental service. Enjoy the added comforts of concierge assistance, free Wi-Fi, and 24-hour room service, for an unforgettable stay.

packages.overview:
• Located in the Indian Ocean, Mauritius is renowned for its white-sand beaches, turquoise lagoons, and coral reefs — making it a top destination for relaxation and water activities.

  • The island offers a rich cultural blend of Indian, French, Creole, Chinese, and African influences, reflected in its cuisine, festivals, and everyday life.

  • Beyond its beaches, Mauritius boasts lush green mountains, scenic waterfalls, nature parks, and adventure activities like hiking, snorkeling, dolphin watching, and more.

Welcome to the enchanting island nation of the Indian Ocean — your unforgettable Mauritius family holiday begins here!

Upon your arrival at the Mauritius airport, a Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and escort you to your resort in comfort.

After checking in, take some time to refresh and relax. Depending on your arrival time, feel free to explore the nearby surroundings at your own pace or simply unwind and soak in the serene beauty of the island.

As evening descends, delight in a delicious dinner served at the resort — a perfect time to savor local flavors and enjoy quality moments with your family. Afterward, retreat to the comfort of your room for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Mauritius Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Airport","to":"Mauritius","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":386,"h_name":"Tarisa Resort and Spa Mauritius","h_country":"Mauritius","h_city":"Mauritius","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Tarisa Resort and Spa Mauritius/1739523917277-Tarisa Resort and Spa Mauritius 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Tarisa Resort and Spa Mauritius/1739523917368-Tarisa Resort and Spa Mauritius 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Tarisa Resort and Spa Mauritius/1739523917417-Tarisa Resort and Spa Mauritius.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day South Island Tour","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

{"title":"Swagata Chatterjee","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-11","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

overview:
Limited Escapes: Curated Journeys Beyond the Ordinary

Step into a world of unparalleled exclusivity with our Limited Escapes—where each itinerary is a handcrafted masterpiece reserved for discerning travelers. At Travelxploria, celebrated as the Best Travel Agency, we elevate luxury to new heights by offering only a handful of seats to ultra-exclusive destinations. Whether you dream of a private desert oasis under starlit skies or a hidden cliff-edge villa overlooking a turquoise sea, our Limited Escapes transform once-in-a-lifetime fantasies into seamless realities.

Every best package in this collection is designed around the principle of “less is more.” We limit group sizes to ensure you experience genuine intimacy—be it in a secluded mountain hamlet, a remote island refuge, or an ancient vineyard estate. Imagine sipping vintage champagne at sunset on your own private peninsula, with only the ocean breeze as your companion. From bespoke transfers on chartered yachts and helicopters to behind-the-scenes tours of legendary landmarks after hours, our logistics are as discreet as they are luxurious, reflecting our reputation as the Best Tour Operator for elite adventures.

For couples seeking an extraordinary best honeymoon package, Limited Escapes offers romantic sanctuaries that few have ever seen. Envision a candlelit dinner suspended beneath a canopy of olive trees in a centuries-old hilltop hamlet, or a sunrise hot-air balloon flight over frost-tipped deserts, followed by breakfast on a windswept dune. Our honeymoon specialists craft every detail—from personalized love letters awaiting you in your suite to private spa treatments using locally foraged botanicals—solidifying Travelxploria’s standing as the Best International Travel Agent for personalized romance.

Families or small groups can also discover the thrill of exclusive discovery. Our family package options in Limited Escapes focus on immersive, private experiences: a bespoke treasure hunt through UNESCO-protected ruins, an after-hours gala in a centuries-old chateau, or a hands-on culinary session with a Michelin-starred chef in a private estate kitchen. With group sizes capped and safety protocols meticulously observed, you’ll create stories that few others can claim—an affirmation of why we’re recognized as the Best International Tour Operator for bespoke group travel.

What truly separates our Limited Escapes is a commitment to authenticity and privacy. We partner with family-run luxury hideaways, conservation-minded sanctuaries, and elite local collectors to grant you access to storied art collections, protected wildlife reserves, and secret beach coves. Each journey is carbon-offset and supports community initiatives, making your best package not only exclusive but also ethically enriching.

Every element of your Limited Escape is customizable. Craving a midnight submarine excursion beneath bioluminescent waves? We’ll arrange it. Longing for a private sunrise yoga ceremony on a clifftop terrace? Consider it scheduled. Dreaming of a midnight treasure hunt in a desert palace? Your personal curator awaits. This level of personalization has cemented Travelxploria’s reputation as the Best Travel Agency for travelers who settle for nothing less than the extraordinary.

Hover over our “Limited Escapes” menu and unlock a realm where privacy, luxury, and adventure converge. With Travelxploria guiding the way, your next voyage becomes an exclusive legend—crafted just for you.
